title: Parametric Resonance and RF-to-THz Frequency Conversion in Semiconductor Plasmonic Crystals
summary: We show that plasma excitations in nanoscale field-effect transistor structures with periodic alternation of gated and ungated regions (plasmonic crystals) differ fundamentally from conventional plasmons in isolated gated or ungated regions. In contrast to the linear dispersion of purely gated plasmons and the square-root dispersion of ungated plasmons, these collective modes also exhibit a parabolic dispersion law characterized by a finite effective mass. We call these excitations "rotonic plasmons" emphasizing the analogy to roton-like excitations. The dynamics of rotonic plasmons are governed by a generalized Mathieu equation, describing either resonant or non-resonant parametric excitations of rotonic plasmons depending on damping. These nonlinear resonances can be efficiently driven by gate-voltage pumping, avoiding the spatial nonuniformities and electron drift velocity saturation effects associated with current-driven excitation. Gate-voltage pumping enables much higher terahertz (THz) power levels in plasmonic crystals. More importantly, in contrast to source-drain excitation, gate voltage pumping has the same gate voltage swing over large area transistors or transistor arrays. We develop a unified theory of rotonic plasmons and demonstrate their application for RF to THz frequency multiplication and THz generation. Starting from the general dispersion relation in plasmonic crystals based on coupled gated-ungated regions with two-dimensional electron gas, we derive the parabolic ("rotonic") plasmon spectrum and establish its analogy with roton-like excitations. The analysis predicts parametric instabilities in III-N and III-V plasmonic crystals under gate-voltage pumping. The results confirm that these systems can function as tunable, compact THz sources and detectors suitable for emerging 6G communications and sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新型等离子体激发——"rotonic plasmons"，它在具有周期性栅极/非栅极区域的纳米场效应晶体管结构中表现出独特的抛物线色散关系，类似于rotons的激发特性，可用于高效THz频率生成和检测。
AI.motivation: 传统等离子体激元在栅极区域具有线性色散，在非栅极区域具有平方根色散，但在周期性栅极/非栅极交替的等离子体晶体结构中，等离子体激发展现出新的物理特性，这为开发新型THz源和探测器提供了机会。
AI.method: 基于具有二维电子气的耦合栅极-非栅极区域等离子体晶体的一般色散关系，推导出抛物线（"rotonic"）等离子体谱，建立其与roton-like激发的类比，并通过广义Mathieu方程描述其动力学，分析栅极电压泵浦下的参数不稳定性。
AI.result: 在III-N和III-V等离子体晶体中预测了栅极电压泵浦下的参数不稳定性，证实这些系统可作为可调谐、紧凑的THz源和探测器，适用于新兴6G通信和传感应用，栅极电压泵浦能实现比源漏激发更高的THz功率水平。
AI.conclusion: Rotonic plasmons作为等离子体晶体中的新型集体激发模式，具有独特的抛物线色散关系，通过栅极电压泵浦可实现高效THz频率倍频和生成，为6G通信和传感应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Unveiling Topological Fusion in Quantum Hall Systems from Microscopic Principles
summary: Establishing the fusion rules of anyonic quasiparticles in fractional quantum Hall fluids is essential for understanding their underlying topological order. Building on the conjecture that key topological properties are encoded in the "DNA" of candidate many-body wave functions - that is, the pattern of dominant orbital occupations restricted to a finite number of lowest Landau levels - we propose a combinatorial framework that derives these fusion rules directly from microscopic data. By extending Schrieffer's counting argument and introducing classes of topological excitations, our framework provides a unified route to the fusion rules for both Abelian and non-Abelian excitations. This approach elucidates the emergence of topological features from first principles in both fermionic and bosonic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个组合框架，直接从微观数据推导分数量子霍尔流体中任意子准粒子的融合规则，统一处理阿贝尔和非阿贝尔激发。
AI.motivation: 建立分数量子霍尔流体中任意子准粒子的融合规则对于理解其底层拓扑序至关重要。关键拓扑性质被编码在候选多体波函数的"DNA"中，即限制在有限个最低朗道能级的主导轨道占据模式。
AI.method: 扩展Schrieffer的计数论证，引入拓扑激发类别，提出一个组合框架，直接从微观数据（轨道占据模式）推导融合规则。
AI.result: 该框架为阿贝尔和非阿贝尔激发提供了统一的融合规则推导路径，阐明了拓扑特征从费米子和玻色子系统第一性原理中的涌现。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析多体波函数的轨道占据模式，可以直接从微观数据推导拓扑融合规则，为理解分数量子霍尔系统的拓扑序提供了新视角。

title: Nonequilibrium Cooper quartet generation in superconducting devices
summary: Cooper quartets are aggregates of four electrons that generalize the concept of Cooper pairs, and their study can unfold unexplored perspectives in correlated matter and many-body physics. We propose a method to isolate them in a double-quantum-dot system coupled to conventional superconducting and normal leads. By driving the system out of equilibrium, we show that a resonance between the vacuum $|0\rangle$ and the four-electron state $|4e\rangle$ emerges in the high bias voltage regime, which involves a two-Cooper pair exchange process and is characterized by finite quartet correlations. We study the transport properties of the system and show that a peak in the Andreev current at high bias voltage has a width that scales with the magnitude of the quartet coupling $Γ_{4e}$, which can be tuned by the phase of additional superconducting leads, yielding distinctive signatures. By further studying the current-current correlations and the Fano factor, we establish a regime characterized by equal auto- and cross-correlations, which we interpret as a definitive signature of fast coherent two-Cooper-pair oscillations between the dots and the superconducting leads. The proposed platform, experimentally accessible in a quantum solid-state laboratory, enables exploration of quartet correlations and multifermion-correlated states of matter.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在双量子点系统中隔离Cooper四重态的方法，通过非平衡驱动实现真空态与四电子态之间的共振，并展示了这种四重态相关的独特输运特征。
AI.motivation: Cooper四重态作为四个电子的聚合体，是Cooper对概念的推广，研究它们可以揭示关联物质和多体物理中未被探索的视角。然而，在实验上隔离和探测Cooper四重态具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出使用耦合到常规超导和正常引线的双量子点系统。通过将系统驱动到非平衡状态，在高偏压区域实现真空态|0⟩与四电子态|4e⟩之间的共振，涉及两个Cooper对的交换过程。通过调节额外超导引线的相位来调控四重态耦合强度Γ₄ₑ。
AI.result: 在高偏压区域观察到Andreev电流峰值，其宽度与四重态耦合强度Γ₄ₑ成比例。通过电流-电流关联和Fano因子分析，发现了自关联和交叉关联相等的特征区域，这被解释为量子点与超导引线之间快速相干双Cooper对振荡的明确特征。
AI.conclusion: 提出的实验平台能够在固态量子实验室中实现，为探索四重态关联和多费米子关联物质态提供了可行途径，为研究Cooper四重态及其在关联物质物理中的作用开辟了新方向。

title: Anisotropic spin-valley coupling in SiMOS and Si/SiGe quantum dots
summary: While bulk silicon has long been understood to exhibit relatively weak spin-orbit coupling (SOC), confinement of electrons to quantum dots (QDs) at a silicon heterointerface results in significantly larger SOC. This is a concern for electron spin qubit performance, as intravalley and intervalley SOC can significantly perturb the operation of electron spin qubits. While these interactions can be harnessed to drive coherent rotations in a singlet-triplet qubit, coupling to low-lying excited valley states can lead to undesirable spin relaxation when valley splitting is on resonance with the Zeeman energy. In this work, we measure the angular dependence of the interfacial spin-orbit interaction as a function of the direction and magnitude of an applied external magnetic field in SiMOS and Si/SiGe heterostructures, two common material platforms for silicon spin qubits. We construct a physical model that accurately infers intra- and inter-valley SOC physics from fits to the data, allowing for a direct comparison between these two material systems. For the devices measured we find that, while the $g$-factor differences are comparable, the SiMOS QDs exhibit an order of magnitude larger spin-valley coupling than for Si/SiGe. Moreover, we find that the angular dependence of the spin-valley coupling is similar for both devices, with similar magnetic field orientations minimizing the spin-valley coupling. Our work points towards operational schemes for optimizing spin-valley coupling to avoid or exploit this mechanism for qubit operation.

AI.tldr: 硅量子点中界面自旋轨道耦合的角依赖性测量与建模，比较SiMOS和Si/SiGe两种材料平台的自旋-谷耦合强度
AI.motivation: 硅量子点中的自旋轨道耦合虽然比体硅强，但会影响电子自旋量子比特的性能。自旋-谷耦合可能导致不希望的弛豫，特别是在谷分裂与塞曼能量共振时。需要理解不同硅材料平台中自旋轨道耦合的特性。
AI.method: 测量SiMOS和Si/SiGe异质结构中界面自旋轨道相互作用随外加磁场方向和强度的角依赖性。构建物理模型从数据拟合中准确推断谷内和谷间自旋轨道耦合物理，直接比较两种材料系统。
AI.result: 测量器件显示：虽然g因子差异相当，但SiMOS量子点的自旋-谷耦合比Si/SiGe大一个数量级。两种器件的自旋-谷耦合角依赖性相似，最小化自旋-谷耦合的磁场方向也相似。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为优化自旋-谷耦合提供了操作方案，既可以避免这种机制对量子比特操作的负面影响，也可以利用它进行相干旋转驱动。

title: Signature of Unconventional Superconductivity in the High Temperature Normal State Resistivity
summary: Unconventional superconductivity remains one of the central unsolved problems in quantum materials, and revealing its connection to the normal state is widely believed to be key to uncovering the pairing mechanism. Previous efforts have largely focused on the temperature range immediately above the superconducting transition, where specific scattering channels-such as strange-metal transport-have been identified as sharing a possible microscopic origin with superconductivity. Here, using machine learning, we demonstrate a strong correlation between normal-state resistivity and superconductivity in Fe-based superconductors. Remarkably, the predictive information reside in a wide window of 150-300 K, far above $T_c$ of this family. We further show that the signatures of superconductivity are distributed across multiple scattering channels, which requires further theoretical investigation.

AI.tldr: 机器学习揭示铁基超导体中正常态电阻率与超导性存在强相关性，预测信息存在于远高于Tc的150-300K温度窗口
AI.motivation: 非常规超导性是量子材料中的核心未解问题，揭示其与正常态的联系被认为是理解配对机制的关键。先前研究主要关注超导转变温度附近的区域，而本研究旨在探索更宽温度范围内正常态与超导性的关联
AI.method: 使用机器学习方法分析铁基超导体的正常态电阻率数据，识别与超导性相关的预测特征，特别关注150-300K温度窗口
AI.result: 发现正常态电阻率与超导性之间存在强相关性，预测信息存在于远高于Tc的150-300K温度窗口，且超导性特征分布在多个散射通道中
AI.conclusion: 铁基超导体的超导性特征在远高于Tc的正常态中已存在，且分布在多个散射通道中，这需要进一步的理论研究来解释其微观机制

title: Reevaluating Quantum Geometric Criteria for Itinerant Magnetic Instabilities
summary: The interplay between quantum geometry and electron correlation has emerged as a compelling paradigm in quantum many-body physics. Recent studies have highlighted the diagnostic utility of quantum geometry in identifying magnetic instabilities within itinerant electron systems. In the present work, we critically re-examine these theoretical proposals. Using the Ginzburg-Landau framework within the Hartree-Fock mean-field approximation and accounting for multiple channels of magnetic ordering, we formulate a rigorous matrix-based instability criterion in the channel representation for generic two-orbital systems. Our results demonstrate that magnetic phase transitions are intricately governed by the interplay between the bare susceptibility tensor and the spin interaction matrix. Consequently, prior assertions that instabilities can be predicted solely from the quantum geometric structure of a single-channel susceptibility are valid only under complete channel decoupling in both the interaction and susceptibility matrices. By adopting the channel representation, our formulation achieves greater physical transparency and computational tractability compared to the conventional orbital-space approach, thereby furnishing a promising alternative for advancing theoretical studies of complex multi-orbital systems.

AI.tldr: 重新审视量子几何与磁不稳定性关系，提出基于通道表示的矩阵不稳定性判据，证明仅凭单通道量子几何预测不稳定性需完全解耦条件。
AI.motivation: 量子几何与电子关联的相互作用已成为量子多体物理中的重要范式，近期研究强调量子几何在识别巡游电子系统磁不稳定性中的诊断作用。本文批判性地重新审视这些理论提案。
AI.method: 采用Ginzburg-Landau框架和Hartree-Fock平均场近似，考虑多通道磁有序，在通道表示中为通用双轨道系统建立了严格的矩阵不稳定性判据。
AI.result: 磁相变由裸磁化率张量和自旋相互作用矩阵的相互作用精细调控。先前仅从单通道磁化率的量子几何结构预测不稳定性的主张，仅在相互作用和磁化率矩阵完全解耦时才有效。
AI.conclusion: 通道表示相比传统轨道空间方法具有更好的物理透明度和计算可处理性，为复杂多轨道系统的理论研究提供了有前景的替代方案。

title: Comment on "Extension of the adiabatic theorem"
summary: Phys. Rev. B 113, 165102 (2026) proposed the conjecture that, for quantum quenches within the same phase, the overlap between the initial ground state and postquench eigenstates is maximal for the postquench ground state. We show that this conjecture is not valid in general. An explicit local, translationally invariant, gapped free-fermion counterexample exists even though the pre- and postquench Hamiltonians are connected by a symmetry-preserving gapped path and the thermodynamic-limit spectrum is continuous.

AI.tldr: 论文反驳了先前关于量子淬火中初始基态与淬火后本征态重叠最大化的猜想，通过构建一个局域、平移不变、有能隙的自由费米子反例证明该猜想不成立。
AI.motivation: 先前研究提出猜想：在相同相内的量子淬火中，初始基态与淬火后本征态的重叠在淬火后基态处达到最大。本文旨在检验这一猜想的普遍有效性。
AI.method: 构建了一个具体的反例：局域、平移不变、有能隙的自由费米子模型，其中前淬火和后淬火哈密顿量通过对称性保持的有能隙路径连接，且热力学极限下谱是连续的。
AI.result: 成功构造出反例，证明原始猜想不成立。即使满足前淬火和后淬火哈密顿量通过对称性保持的有能隙路径连接，且热力学极限下谱连续的条件，初始基态与淬火后本征态的重叠也不一定在淬火后基态处最大。
AI.conclusion: 先前提出的关于量子淬火中态重叠最大化的猜想不具有普遍性，即使在看似合理的物理条件下也可能失效，这对理解量子淬火动力学有重要意义。

title: Modelling Gas-Phase Reaction Kinetics with Guided Particle Diffusion Sampling
summary: Physics-guided sampling with diffusion priors has recently shown strong performance in solving complex systems of partial differential equations (PDEs) from sparse observations. However, these methods are typically evaluated on benchmark problems that do not fully demonstrate their ability to generate temporally consistent solutions of time-dependent PDEs, often focusing instead on reconstructing a single snapshot. In this work, we apply these methods to gas-phase reaction kinetics problems governed by the advection-reaction-diffusion (ARD) equation, providing a setting that more closely reflects realistic laboratory experiments. We demonstrate that guided sampling can be used to reconstruct full spatiotemporal trajectories, rather than isolated states. Furthermore, we show that these methods generalise to previously unseen parameter regimes, highlighting their potential for real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 扩散先验的物理引导采样方法在求解稀疏观测的复杂PDE系统方面表现出色，但现有评估多关注单时刻重建而非时间一致性。本文将该方法应用于更接近真实实验的气相反应动力学问题，展示了其重建完整时空轨迹和泛化到未见参数的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散先验的物理引导采样方法主要评估在基准问题上，这些评估未能充分展示方法在时间相关PDE中生成时间一致解的能力，通常只关注重建单个快照。需要在实际应用场景中验证这些方法的有效性。
AI.method: 将物理引导采样方法应用于由平流-反应-扩散（ARD）方程控制的气相反应动力学问题，使用扩散先验结合物理约束进行采样，重建完整的时空轨迹而非孤立状态。
AI.result: 研究表明引导采样能够重建完整的时空轨迹，而不仅仅是孤立状态。更重要的是，这些方法能够泛化到先前未见过的参数体系，显示出在实际应用中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 物理引导采样方法在更接近真实实验室实验的气相反应动力学问题中表现出色，能够生成时间一致的完整时空轨迹，并具备良好的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Two New Molecular Nitrogen Phases near Megabar Pressures
summary: Molecular nitrogen exhibits remarkable structural diversity near the polymeric transition, where multiple phases are metastable. Here, we report two new molecular phases. The first, $tζ$-N$_2$, is a polytype of monoclinic $C2/c$ $ζ$-N$_2$, characterized by a tripled $c$ axis and 96 atoms per unit cell. The second, $ξ$-N$_2$, is a previously unreported hexagonal phase ($P6cc$) containing 112 atoms per unit cell. Both phases were synthesized in a diamond anvil cell by laser heating $ζ$-N$_2$ to 1800--2500~K at pressures of 78--98~GPa. Their crystal structures were determined using single-crystal X-ray diffraction, corroborated by Raman spectroscopy, and supported by first-principles calculations. The $tζ$-N$_2$ phase likely corresponds to the previously reported $κ$-N$_2$ phase.

AI.tldr: 在78-98 GPa高压下激光加热ζ-N₂至1800-2500 K，发现了两个新的分子氮相：tζ-N₂（ζ-N₂的多型体）和ξ-N₂（新型六方相）
AI.motivation: 分子氮在聚合转变附近表现出显著的结构多样性，存在多个亚稳态相，但仍有未知相需要探索
AI.method: 使用金刚石压砧在78-98 GPa高压下激光加热ζ-N₂至1800-2500 K，通过单晶X射线衍射确定晶体结构，辅以拉曼光谱和第一性原理计算验证
AI.result: 成功合成了两个新相：tζ-N₂（单斜C2/c ζ-N₂的多型体，c轴三倍，96原子/晶胞）和ξ-N₂（六方P6cc相，112原子/晶胞），tζ-N₂可能对应先前报道的κ-N₂相
AI.conclusion: 在高压高温条件下发现了氮的两种新分子相，扩展了对氮在聚合转变附近结构多样性的认识，为理解氮的高压行为提供了新见解

title: Ultrafast nonadiabatic dynamics of tetraphenylsubstituted nitrogen-based heterocycles
summary: Tetraphenylpyrazine (TPP) and 2,3,4,5-tetraphenyl-1H-pyrrole (TePP) are closely related heterocycles bearing four phenyl substituents, whose structural similarity makes them a useful pair for comparing how intramolecular flexibility influences excited-state relaxation and emission in the gas phase and in the solid state. TPP is a prototypical solid-state luminescence enhancement (SLE) emitter, exhibiting a markedly increased quantum yield upon molecular aggregation. In contrast, TePP displays similar quantum yields in solution and solid state, characteristic of dual-state emission (DSE). This behaviour indicates that intramolecular rotations are already significantly hindered in the isolated-molecule regime, consistent with our previous observations for TPP and other solid-state emitters (Hernández-Rodríguez et al., ChemPhysChem, 2024, 25, e202400563). To unravel the excited-state dynamics underlying this contrasting behaviour, we performed mixed quantum-classical trajectory simulations on a single molecule of TPP and TePP employing the surface-hopping method. Twelve singlet states were included at the TD-B3LYP-D3/def2-SVP level, which were previously benchmarked against coupled cluster methods. Simulated observables such as gas phase ultrafast electron diffraction (GUED) and time-resolved fluorescence (TR-FL) signals allow us to dissect the distinct deactivation pathways operating in both systems in the gas phase, while also providing mechanistic insight into how these pathways are expected to evolve in solution and solid-state environments.

AI.tldr: TPP和TePP是结构相似的杂环化合物，但TPP在固态下发光增强(SLE)，而TePP在溶液和固态下都有相似发光效率(DSE)。研究通过量子-经典轨迹模拟揭示了两者不同的激发态弛豫机制。
AI.motivation: 研究TPP和TePP这对结构相似的杂环化合物，比较分子内灵活性如何影响它们在气相和固态下的激发态弛豫和发光行为，揭示固态发光增强(SLE)和双态发光(DSE)现象的分子机制。
AI.method: 采用混合量子-经典轨迹模拟和表面跳跃方法，在TD-B3LYP-D3/def2-SVP水平上包含12个单重态，对单个TPP和TePP分子进行模拟。模拟了气相超快电子衍射(GUED)和时间分辨荧光(TR-FL)信号。
AI.result: TPP表现出典型的固态发光增强行为，而TePP显示双态发光特性。模拟揭示了两种分子在气相中不同的失活途径，并提供了这些途径在溶液和固态环境中如何演变的机制见解。
AI.conclusion: 分子内旋转受阻程度是决定固态发光增强与双态发光差异的关键因素。TePP在孤立分子状态下分子内旋转已显著受阻，这解释了其双态发光行为，而TPP需要固态环境来限制旋转以实现发光增强。

title: Charge-Density Waves of Single and Double NbS$_{3}$ Chains
summary:
The physics of a genuine one-dimensional system in which electrons are confined in one direction remains unclear. The actual electronic state of such a genuinely one-dimensional system has not been investigated in previous experiments, for they have all been conducted on quasi-one-dimensional specimens, namely in strongly anisotropic bulk crystals. Conventionally, charge-density waves (CDWs) driven by Fermi surface nesting have been considered to appear in one-dimensional electron-lattice systems. However, the CDW transitions actually observed to date have all occurred in quasi-one-dimensional systems and therefore do not directly indicate a genuine one-dimensional electronic state.
  We investigated, for the first time, isolated single and double-chain NbS$_{3}$ samples using the carbon-nanotube-sheath method and discovered CDWs in both systems. In the single-chain, surprisingly, a $(1/4)b^*$ CDW was observed, in contrast to the $(1/3)b^*$ CDW that has been observed in bulk samples. In the double-chain, the coexistence of a $(1/2)b^*$ dimer structure and a $(1/3)b^*$ CDW was confirmed. This discovery represents a significant advancement in the field of low-dimensional physics, surpassing the limitations of previous studies on bulk systems.

AI.tldr: 首次在真正的一维单链和双链NbS₃样品中观察到电荷密度波，单链出现(1/4)b* CDW而非体材料的(1/3)b*，双链中(1/2)b*二聚结构与(1/3)b* CDW共存，突破了以往准一维体材料研究的局限。
AI.motivation: 真正一维系统中电子的物理性质尚不清楚，以往实验都在准一维体材料中进行，观察到的CDW转变不能直接反映真正一维电子态。需要研究真正孤立的一维系统来揭示其本质电子状态。
AI.method: 使用碳纳米管鞘方法制备孤立单链和双链NbS₃样品，首次在真正一维系统中研究电荷密度波。
AI.result: 在单链NbS₃中观察到(1/4)b* CDW，与体材料的(1/3)b*不同；在双链NbS₃中确认(1/2)b*二聚结构与(1/3)b* CDW共存。
AI.conclusion: 首次在真正一维系统中发现CDW，揭示了与准一维体材料不同的电子行为，这是低维物理领域的重大进展，突破了以往体材料研究的限制。

title: Quantum Tunnelling and Room-Temperature Superconductivity of Hydride from Size Effects
comment: Prepared for M2S Conference (Materials and Mechanisms of Superconductivity), Stuttgart Germany 19-25 July 2026. Abstract was submitted to M2S on 26 March 2026. 11 pages, 4 figures
summary: Superconductivity of a micron-sized hydride sample measured between metal probes under extreme pressure could be considered as a macroscopic quantum tunnelling phenomenon through metal-hydride-metal. The energy barrier height of hydride is regulated by pressure. The energy barrier width between tips of the metal probes should be minimized to limit the chance of exponential decay in electron tunnelling. There is also a thickness effect since thinner hydride samples around 1 micron are favoured for achieving higher superconductive temperatures. Hence, reduction in both barrier width and sample thickness is recommended to ensure optimum quantum tunnelling for realization of the room temperature superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将高压下金属探针间微米级氢化物样品的超导现象视为金属-氢化物-金属的宏观量子隧穿过程，通过调节压力控制势垒高度，减小势垒宽度和样品厚度以优化量子隧穿，实现室温超导。
AI.motivation: 探索在极端压力下实现室温超导的新机制，将传统超导现象重新解释为宏观量子隧穿过程，为突破当前超导温度限制提供理论框架。
AI.method: 将金属探针间的氢化物样品视为量子隧穿势垒，通过压力调节势垒高度，同时减小势垒宽度（金属探针尖端间距）和样品厚度（约1微米），优化电子隧穿概率以实现超导。
AI.result: 提出通过减小势垒宽度和样品厚度可以显著提高电子隧穿概率，从而获得更高的超导转变温度，为室温超导的实现提供了具体的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 将高压氢化物超导现象解释为宏观量子隧穿过程，通过同时优化势垒高度（压力调节）、势垒宽度和样品厚度，有望实现室温超导，这为超导研究提供了新的理论视角和实验方向。

title: Theoretical and Numerical Efforts in Understanding Modern Experiments on Quantum Magnetism
summary: In recent decades, the study of quantum magnets, which feature unconventional behaviour such as exotic quantum phase transitions and quantum spin liquids, and unconventional magnetic states of matter, has made remarkable progress. However, each of the three foundational pillars -- numerical simulations, analytical methods, and, to a lesser extent, materials synthesis and experiments -- often tends to view itself as the primary driver of the field. Even through the need for collaboration among theory, numerics and experiment to understand the complex phases of quantum magnets is well established, yet, in our view there remains a persistent perception from experts in one area that the other two serve merely as supporting tool, primarily useful for validating the dominant ideas of one specialty, and less relevant to shaping the underlying scientific narrative. In this article, we advocate for a different, more integrated approach to overcome the challenges faced by quantum magnetism researchers. We argue that this alternative mindset has already started to advance the understanding of several important quantum magnetic models and their materials realizations.

AI.tldr: 论文主张量子磁学研究需要更整合的方法，克服数值模拟、理论分析和实验合成之间的隔阂，以推动对量子磁体复杂相的理解。
AI.motivation: 量子磁体研究虽然取得显著进展，但数值模拟、理论分析和实验合成三大支柱领域之间存在隔阂，各领域专家往往视自身为主要驱动力，将其他领域视为辅助工具，这种分离阻碍了对量子磁体复杂相的深入理解。
AI.method: 提出一种更整合的研究方法，强调理论、数值模拟和实验之间的协同合作，而非单向验证关系。这种方法已在一些重要量子磁体模型和材料实现中开始应用。
AI.result: 这种整合方法已经开始推动对若干重要量子磁体模型及其材料实现的理解，显示出跨领域协作的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 量子磁学研究需要超越领域界限的整合方法，让理论、数值模拟和实验平等协作、相互启发，才能更好地理解量子磁体的复杂相和奇异行为。

title: Thermodynamic Curvature and the Widom Ridge in Interacting Spin Systems
summary: We develop a geometric formulation of thermodynamic response in the classical Ising model by defining a curvature field over the control manifold spanned by inverse temperature $β$ and magnetic field $h$. We show that the existence of nontrivial curvature depends sensitively on the choice of control variables: while the $(J,h)$ manifold at fixed temperature is integrable and exhibits zero curvature, the $(β,h)$ manifold supports a finite curvature field arising from variations of the statistical ensemble. This curvature is given by a mixed derivative of the free energy and can be expressed directly as the covariance between energy and magnetization fluctuations. We evaluate the curvature field using Monte Carlo sampling and demonstrate that it develops a pronounced ridge structure extending from the critical point into the supercritical regime. This identifies the Widom line as a geometric feature of control space, corresponding to a locus of maximal thermodynamic response. More generally, the formulation provides a direct connection between geometric thermodynamics, critical phenomena, and experimentally accessible observables, and suggests that thermodynamic curvature may be probed through measurements of work performed under cyclic driving protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文通过定义在控制流形上的曲率场，为经典伊辛模型的热力学响应提供了几何表述，揭示了Widom线作为控制空间几何特征的本质。
AI.motivation: 研究热力学响应的几何表述，探索控制变量选择对曲率的影响，建立几何热力学、临界现象与实验可观测量之间的直接联系。
AI.method: 在由逆温度β和磁场h张成的控制流形上定义曲率场，通过自由能的混合导数表达曲率，利用蒙特卡洛采样计算曲率场分布。
AI.result: 发现(β,h)流形支持有限曲率场，而(J,h)流形在固定温度下可积且曲率为零；曲率场从临界点延伸到超临界区域形成明显的脊状结构，对应Widom线作为最大热力学响应的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 热力学曲率可作为控制空间的几何特征，Widom线对应最大响应轨迹；该几何表述为通过循环驱动协议中的功测量来探测热力学曲率提供了可能。

title: Coarse-Grained Dynamics with Spatial Disorder and Non-Markovian Memory
summary: We introduce the spatial disorder-generalized Langevin equation (SD-GLE), a data-driven method for constructing coarse-grained (CG) dynamics in heterogeneous systems. Unlike conventional CG approaches that rely on a mean-field potential, SD-GLE utilizes a variational Bayesian framework with a random field prior to explicitly disentangle static spatial disorder from viscoelastic friction. Numerical results demonstrate the limits of standard GLEs, whereas SD-GLE accurately extrapolates long-time dynamics to capture the anomalous diffusion crossover from short trajectories and recover the ensemble statistical properties inherent to the disordered nature of these systems.

AI.tldr: 提出SD-GLE方法，通过变分贝叶斯框架和随机场先验，在异质系统中显式分离静态空间无序和粘弹性摩擦，从而准确预测异常扩散交叉和系统统计特性。
AI.motivation: 传统粗粒化方法依赖平均场势，无法有效处理异质系统中的空间无序性，限制了在复杂系统中准确预测长时间动力学行为的能力。
AI.method: 提出空间无序广义朗之万方程(SD-GLE)，采用数据驱动方法，利用变分贝叶斯框架和随机场先验，显式分离静态空间无序和粘弹性摩擦。
AI.result: 数值结果表明标准GLE存在局限性，而SD-GLE能够准确外推长时间动力学，从短轨迹中捕捉异常扩散交叉，并恢复异质系统固有的系综统计特性。
AI.conclusion: SD-GLE为异质系统的粗粒化动力学建模提供了有效框架，能够显式处理空间无序性，克服传统方法的局限性，准确预测复杂系统的统计行为。

title: Intrinsic grain-size gradients upon grain growth near a free surface
comment: 8 figures in the main text; 3 figues in the supplementary information
summary: Grain growth fundamentally shapes the microstructure of crystalline materials upon annealing, affecting their overall mechanical and functional properties. Recently, it has been rationalized that grain growth in polycrystals does not result solely from weighted curvature flow, but elastic effects (intrinsic stress) arised from shear coupling also need to be taken into account. We characterize and examine the effect of free surfaces on grain growth kinetics of high-purity, bulk polycrystalline nickel. By analyzing the microstructural evolution on cross sections of 1 mm thick specimens from the surface to the interior, as well as through in-plane investigations on specimens with varying thickness (1 mm, 40 $μ$m, and 10 $μ$m), an intrinsic grain-size gradient was identified, characterized by a gradual increase in grain size towards the interior. Interestingly, this grading was not restricted to the very surface but continued to depths of five to ten layers of grains, where effects from thermal grooves are considered negligible. We demonstrate that this behavior is significantly affected by elastic relaxation at the free surface, which alters the internal stress fields generated by shear-coupled grain boundary migration. These findings emphasize the relevance of free surfaces to the microstructural evolution of polycrystal.

AI.tldr: 研究发现自由表面对多晶镍晶粒生长动力学有显著影响，揭示了晶粒尺寸从表面到内部逐渐增大的梯度分布现象，这与剪切耦合晶界迁移产生的弹性松弛效应有关。
AI.motivation: 传统晶粒生长理论主要基于加权曲率流，但最近研究表明弹性效应（内在应力）也需要考虑。本研究旨在探究自由表面对多晶材料晶粒生长动力学的影响，特别是弹性松弛如何改变剪切耦合晶界迁移产生的内部应力场。
AI.method: 使用高纯度块状多晶镍样品，通过分析1mm厚样品从表面到内部的横截面微观结构演化，以及在平面内研究不同厚度样品（1mm、40μm和10μm），识别晶粒尺寸梯度分布特征。
AI.result: 发现了内在的晶粒尺寸梯度分布，表现为晶粒尺寸从表面向内部逐渐增大。这种梯度不仅限于表面，而是延伸到5-10层晶粒深度，远超过热沟槽效应的影响范围。研究表明这种行为受到自由表面弹性松弛的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 自由表面对多晶材料的微观结构演化具有重要影响，弹性松弛改变了剪切耦合晶界迁移产生的内部应力场，导致晶粒尺寸梯度分布。这一发现强调了在理解多晶材料微观结构演化时必须考虑自由表面的作用。

title: Correlation-Converged Virtual Orbitals for Accurate and Efficient Quantum Molecular Simulations
summary: Density functional theory with plane-wave basis sets is widely employed in computational materials science, including applications to isolated molecular systems. However, the inadequate description of electron correlation remains a fundamental limitation. Accurate correlation treatments based on many-body Hamiltonians require reliable representations of both occupied and virtual orbitals, yet virtual orbitals are often poorly described in conventional computational schemes, resulting in reduced accuracy. In this work, we introduce localized correlation-converged virtual orbitals (LCCVOs) as an efficient basis for constructing accurate many-body Hamiltonians in molecular systems. Using a substantially reduced number of orbitals, the LCCVO framework yields dissociation energies for singlet, doublet, and triplet molecules that are comparable to, and in many cases exceed, those obtained with high-level correlation-consistent basis sets such as cc-pVXZ (X = D, T, Q, 5). These results demonstrate the efficiency, scalability, and robustness of the LCCVO approach for high-accuracy quantum chemical calculations.

AI.tldr: 提出局部化相关收敛虚轨道(LCCVOs)作为构建精确多体哈密顿量的高效基组，用更少轨道获得与高质量基组相当的解离能
AI.motivation: 平面波基组在计算材料科学中广泛应用，但对电子相关性的描述不足是根本限制。传统计算方案中虚轨道描述不佳，导致多体哈密顿量精度降低
AI.method: 引入局部化相关收敛虚轨道(LCCVOs)作为构建精确多体哈密顿量的高效基组，通过显著减少轨道数量来实现高精度计算
AI.result: LCCVO框架对单重态、双重态和三重态分子的解离能结果与高质量相关一致基组(cc-pVXZ)相当甚至更好，展示了方法的效率、可扩展性和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: LCCVO方法为高精度量子化学计算提供了一种高效、可扩展且稳健的解决方案，能够用更少的轨道获得高质量的电子相关性描述

title: Evolution of topological phases in atomically thin WTe2 films
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, accepted by Chinese Physics Letters
summary: Topological materials ranging from topological insulators to semimetals host many novel quantum phenomena including quantum spin Hall effect and topological Fermi arcs. Transitions between these topological phases have attracted much research interest. We performed angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) on WTe2 ranging from a monolayer to the bulk and reveal the evolution of the electronic structure and the band gap. Notably, the gap observed in the monolayer system is suppressed in the three layers, where the film becomes metallic. Variations in the topological properties with thickness are demonstrated by the first-principles calculations. Topological Z2 invariant is shown to oscillate between 1 and 0 with the addition of layers, originating from the interlayer coupling-induced change in band crossing. The system evolves into a Weyl semimetal when the conduction and valence bands touch near the Fermi level and the topological nature is described by the Chern number. Our findings demonstrate the non-monotonic dependence of topological states on dimensionality and how layer-driven electronic band reconfiguration leads to phase transitions in solids.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过ARPES和第一性原理计算揭示了WTe2从单层到块体的拓扑性质随厚度变化的非单调演化规律，发现层间耦合导致拓扑Z2不变量在1和0之间振荡，最终演化为外尔半金属。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑材料（从拓扑绝缘体到半金属）中不同拓扑相之间的转变机制，探索维度变化如何影响材料的拓扑性质。
AI.method: 使用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）测量WTe2从单层到块体的电子结构，结合第一性原理计算分析拓扑性质随厚度的变化。
AI.result: 发现单层WTe2存在带隙，三层时带隙消失变为金属性；拓扑Z2不变量随层数增加在1和0之间振荡；当导带和价带在费米能级附近接触时，系统演化为外尔半金属，其拓扑性质由陈数描述。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑态对维度具有非单调依赖性，层驱动的电子能带重构导致固体中的相变，为理解拓扑材料中的维度效应提供了重要见解。

title: Ultrafast Magneto-Pressure Spectroscopy and Control of Correlated Phases in a Trilayer Nickelate
summary:
Ultrafast spectroscopy under simultaneous high pressure and magnetic field provides a versatile approach for investigating pressure-driven electronic instabilities and correlated phases, and for probing potential bulk superconducting behavior under extreme conditions. However, such an experimental platform has yet to be implemented, standing as a roadblock to a fuller understanding of nonequilibrium superconductivity and vortex-controlled quasi-particle (QP) dynamics.
  Here, we bridge this capability gap by developing high pressure (up to 40 GPa), high magnetic field (up to 7 T), cryogenic (down to 5 K) femtosecond spectroscopy, and using it to probe magneto-pressure evolution of quasiparticle dynamics in the trilayer nickelate $\mathrm{Pr}_4\mathrm{Ni}_3\mathrm{O}_{10}$.
  We observe pronounced critical slowing down of QP relaxation at the charge-density-wave transition, which collapses under applied pressure. At higher pressures, the relaxation instead lengthens at low temperature, consistent with incipient superconducting correlations.
  However, the negligibel magnetic-field-dependence up to 7~T and absence of vortex-induced pre-bottleneck dynamics--robust signatures observed in our controlled bulk superconducting samples--indicates that any superconducting state under the present pressure conditions is likely non-bulk, filamentary, or strongly inhomogeneous.
  The magneto-pressure ultrafast capability opens a new avenue for resolving outstanding questions surrounding pressure-induced superconductivity and intertwined orders in correlated quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 开发了高压（40 GPa）、强磁场（7 T）、低温（5 K）飞秒光谱平台，用于研究Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀镍酸盐在磁压条件下的准粒子动力学，观察到电荷密度波转变的临界减速现象，并发现高压下可能存在非体相的超导相关性。
AI.motivation: 同时施加高压和强磁场的超快光谱技术对于研究压力驱动的电子不稳定性、关联相以及极端条件下的体超导行为至关重要，但此前缺乏这样的实验平台，阻碍了对非平衡超导性和涡旋控制准粒子动力学的深入理解。
AI.method: 开发了高压（最高40 GPa）、强磁场（最高7 T）、低温（最低5 K）飞秒光谱实验平台，并将其应用于研究三层镍酸盐Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀在磁压条件下的准粒子动力学演化。
AI.result: 在电荷密度波转变处观察到明显的准粒子弛豫临界减速现象，该现象在施加压力后消失。在更高压力下，低温弛豫时间反而延长，这与初生的超导相关性一致。然而，高达7 T的磁场依赖可忽略不计，且未观察到涡旋诱导的预瓶颈动力学（在对照体超导样品中观察到的稳健特征），表明在当前压力条件下任何超导态都可能是非体相、丝状或强不均匀的。
AI.conclusion: 磁压超快光谱能力为解决关联量子材料中压力诱导超导性和交织序的突出问题开辟了新途径，为研究极端条件下的非平衡超导现象提供了重要工具。

title: UCd$_{11}$: A strongly localized 5$f^3$ material
summary: UCd$_{11}$ is an antiferromagnetic uranium intermetallic compound ($T_{\rm N}$ = 5.3K) with enhanced electron mass and uranium-uranium spacings nearly twice the Hill limit, suggesting a weakly hybridized 5$f$ electronic character. Various x-ray spectroscopy techniques indicate that uranium in UCd$_{11}$ adopts the formal U$^{3+}$ 5$f^3$ configuration, while core-level photoemission spectroscopy (PES) data of UCd$_{11}$ reveal only a weak satellite feature, typically interpreted as a signature of itinerancy. In this work, we present density functional theory (DFT) combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) calculations of UCd$_{11}$, using material-specific parameters tuned to reproduce valence-band PES spectra at different photon energies, thereby exploiting the energy dependence of photoionization cross sections. Our results demonstrate that UCd$_{11}$ is a highly localized uranium 5$f^3$ system. Furthermore, core-level spectra obtained from a DFT+DMFT Anderson impurity model reveal that, contrary to common assumptions, the presence or absence of satellite structures is not a reliable indicator of strong correlations or itinerant 5$f$ behavior.

AI.tldr: UCd11是局域化的铀5f³系统，核心能级光谱中卫星结构的存在与否不能可靠指示强关联或巡游5f行为。
AI.motivation: UCd11具有反铁磁性、增强电子质量和铀间距接近Hill极限两倍的特点，但核心能级光电子能谱仅显示弱卫星特征，这与通常对巡游行为的解释相矛盾，需要澄清其电子性质。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论计算，利用材料特定参数调整以重现不同光子能量下的价带光电子能谱，利用光电离截面的能量依赖性，并通过DFT+DMFT Anderson杂质模型获得核心能级光谱。
AI.result: 计算表明UCd11是高度局域化的铀5f³系统，核心能级光谱分析显示卫星结构的存在与否不能可靠指示强关联或巡游5f行为。
AI.conclusion: UCd11是局域化5f³系统，传统上通过核心能级光谱卫星特征判断电子局域化程度的方法不可靠，需要更全面的理论方法分析。

title: Quantum many-body operator cascade as a route to chaos
summary: Dynamical properties of classical chaotic systems, for instance relaxation, can be understood as emerging from the time evolution of initially smooth long-wavelength densities to ever finer short-wavelength densities with fractal structure. Whether there is any analogous fractality by which one could characterize quantum many-body chaos is not known. By studying the spectral properties of the truncated operator propagator, we provide such structures. Namely, we show that the slowest-decaying operators, i.e., the leading Ruelle-Pollicott eigenvectors, have a nontrivial fractal dimension quantifying their non-locality, visible also in the divergence of their condition numbers. Furthermore, we find that unitarity imposes a constraint, i.e., an (approximate) equality, between the temporal decay rate of local correlations and this spatial operator fractal dimension. With this insight, a scenario for many-body quantum chaos becomes clear: over time, local operators evolve towards increasingly non-local ones with a quantifiable fractal structure, thereby naturally leading to effective non-unitary relaxation on the subspace of local operators - a kind of many-body Kolmogorov cascade in the space of operators. Our predictions are demonstrated in various quantum circuits: the kicked Ising model, brickwall circuits with a random 2-qubit gate, and dual-unitary circuits, where our results are exact.

AI.tldr: 量子多体混沌中，局部算符随时间演化会变得非局域化并具有分形结构，这导致局部算符子空间上的有效非幺正弛豫，类似于算符空间中的多体Kolmogorov级联。
AI.motivation: 经典混沌系统的动力学特性（如弛豫）可以通过从初始光滑的长波长密度演化到具有分形结构的短波长密度来理解。然而，量子多体混沌是否存在类似的分形特性来表征尚不清楚。
AI.method: 通过研究截断算符传播子的谱性质，分析最慢衰减算符（即主导的Ruelle-Pollicott特征向量）的分形维度，并考察幺正性对局部关联时间衰减率与算符分形维度之间关系的约束。
AI.result: 发现最慢衰减算符具有非平凡的分形维度，量化了它们的非局域性；幺正性约束了局部关联的时间衰减率与算符分形维度之间的（近似）等式关系；局部算符随时间演化会变得非局域化并具有可量化的分形结构。
AI.conclusion: 量子多体混沌表现为：局部算符随时间演化成为具有分形结构的非局域算符，导致局部算符子空间上的有效非幺正弛豫，形成算符空间中的多体Kolmogorov级联。这一预测在多种量子电路中得到验证。

title: Consistent control of energy dissipation in non-spherical particle contact via a structure-preserving formulation
summary:
The control of energy dissipation in non-spherical particle contact remains an unresolved problem. Unlike spherical contact, where the interaction reduces to a one-dimensional normal oscillator, both the effective inertia and the effective stiffness depend on the evolving contact geometry, and the impact dynamics are intrinsically coupled across translational, rotational, and tangential directions. Classical damping formulations are therefore structurally incompatible with the contact dynamics they are intended to represent.
  This work addresses the problem from first principles. By projecting the dynamics onto contact degrees of freedom, the interaction is shown to be governed by an instantaneous contact dynamics with a configuration-dependent projected mass and intrinsic translational--rotational coupling. Building on the exact energy--phase transformation for monotone conservative contact, we show that consistent dissipation requires a unique damping structure aligned with the underlying contact energy.
  The analysis leads to two central consequences. First, the admissible damping law is not empirical but fixed by the harmonic structure revealed in transformed space. Second, the appropriate coefficient of restitution for non-spherical particles is the contact-point restitution $e_{cn}$, whereas the total energy restitution $e_E$ is a geometry-dependent outcome that includes coupling-induced energy transfer.
  Numerical evidence based on smooth single-contact impacts confirms the theory: the resulting formulation controls $e_{cn}$ consistently across impact configurations, while the apparent variability of $e_E$ follows directly from the coupled dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文从第一性原理出发，为非球形粒子接触中的能量耗散控制问题提供了理论框架，揭示了接触点恢复系数e_cn是基本参数，而总能量恢复系数e_E是几何依赖的耦合结果。
AI.motivation: 非球形粒子接触中的能量耗散控制是一个未解决的问题。与球形接触可简化为一维法向振荡器不同，非球形接触的有效惯量和有效刚度都依赖于演化的接触几何形状，冲击动力学在平移、旋转和切向方向上本质耦合。经典阻尼公式在结构上与它们试图表示的接触动力学不兼容。
AI.method: 从第一性原理出发，通过将动力学投影到接触自由度上，证明相互作用由具有配置依赖投影质量和固有平移-旋转耦合的瞬时接触动力学控制。基于单调保守接触的精确能量-相位变换，证明一致的耗散需要与底层接触能量对齐的独特阻尼结构。
AI.result: 分析得出两个核心结论：1) 可容许的阻尼定律不是经验性的，而是由变换空间中揭示的谐波结构固定；2) 非球形粒子的适当恢复系数是接触点恢复系数e_cn，而总能量恢复系数e_E是包含耦合诱导能量转移的几何依赖结果。基于光滑单接触冲击的数值证据证实了该理论。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非球形粒子接触中的能量耗散提供了严格的理论基础，表明接触点恢复系数e_cn是控制冲击响应的基本参数，而总能量恢复系数e_E的明显变异性直接来自耦合动力学，为颗粒材料建模提供了更准确的框架。

title: On the complementary roles of anisotropic crack density and anisotropic crack driving force in phase-field modeling of mixed-mode fracture
summary: Phase-field models for anisotropic fracture employ two complementary mechanisms: (i) the anisotropic crack density function, controlling direction-dependent fracture resistance, and (ii) the anisotropic strain energy, governing the fracture driving force. Although the unified framework was presented in Pranavi et al.[Comput. Mech., 73 (2024)], the distinct roles of these mechanisms and their interaction remain uninvestigated. This work addresses this gap by first validating the formulation against mixed-mode fracture experiments on a soft elastomer (Lu et al. [Extreme Mech. Lett., 48 (2021)]), and then conducting systematic parametric studies on single-edge-notched (SEN) and open-hole tension (OHT) specimens to isolate each mechanism. The SEN studies show that the crack density anisotropy controls the crack path and toughness while leaving the elastic response unchanged, whereas the anisotropic strain energy deflects the crack but saturates rapidly. The OHT studies reveal a geometry-dependent role expansion: the anisotropic strain energy governs fiber-orientation-dependent stiffness, peak force, and fracture displacement. When both mechanisms act together, the combined response exhibits nonlinear synergistic interaction exceeding the linear sum of the individual contributions. These results establish that the crack density anisotropy governs the crack path (fracture resistance), while the anisotropic strain energy governs the driving force and, in stress-concentration geometries, additionally controls the elastic strain energy distribution around the stress concentrator.

AI.tldr: 相场断裂模型中的两种各向异性机制：裂纹密度各向异性控制裂纹路径和韧性，各向异性应变能控制驱动力和应力集中区的能量分布，两者结合产生非线性协同效应。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有统一框架，但相场断裂模型中两种各向异性机制（裂纹密度各向异性和各向异性应变能）的具体作用和相互作用尚未深入研究。
AI.method: 首先验证模型与软弹性体混合模式断裂实验的一致性，然后通过单边缺口和开孔拉伸试样的系统参数研究，分离两种机制的作用。
AI.result: 裂纹密度各向异性控制裂纹路径和韧性但不影响弹性响应；各向异性应变能会偏转裂纹但快速饱和。在开孔拉伸中，各向异性应变能控制纤维取向相关的刚度、峰值力和断裂位移。两种机制结合时产生非线性协同效应。
AI.conclusion: 裂纹密度各向异性主要控制裂纹路径（断裂阻力），而各向异性应变能控制驱动力，在应力集中几何中额外控制应力集中器周围的弹性应变能分布。

title: Effective theory of quantum phases in the dipolar planar rotor chain
summary: In this work, we develop a theoretical description of the collective behavior of interacting dipolar planar rotors by using time independent perturbation theory and a small angle quadratic approximation. The ground state properties for both the ordered and disordered quantum phases of the system are directly calculated and analyzed. Time-independent perturbation theory is shown to be appropriate for the disordered phase. For the ordered phase, we construct a quadratic approximation based on the stable equilibrium configurations of the dipolar ordering; we show that the inclusion of the quartic terms from the expansion of the potential energy are essential to correct the shift in the energy spectrum due to quantization ambiguities. Numerical techniques such as Exact Diagonalization and Density Matrix Renormalization Group are used for the benchmark the quality of both approximations.

AI.tldr: 本文使用微扰理论和二次近似研究相互作用的偶极平面转子的集体行为，分析了有序和无序量子相的基态性质，并通过数值方法验证了近似质量。
AI.motivation: 研究相互作用的偶极平面转子系统的集体行为，理解其有序和无序量子相的基态性质，为这类量子多体系统提供理论描述。
AI.method: 使用时独立微扰理论处理无序相，对有序相采用基于稳定平衡构型的小角度二次近似，并包含四次项修正量子化歧义导致的能谱偏移。使用精确对角化和密度矩阵重整化群进行数值验证。
AI.result: 微扰理论适用于无序相，有序相需要包含四次项的二次近似来修正量子化歧义导致的能谱偏移。数值方法验证了两种近似的质量。
AI.conclusion: 为偶极平面转子系统提供了有效的理论描述框架，微扰理论适用于无序相，有序相需要包含高阶修正的二次近似，数值验证支持了理论方法的可靠性。

title: Wave Packet Propagation in Tilted Weyl Semimetals for Black Hole Analog Systems
summary: We explore the realization of distinct analog black hole horizons within tilted Weyl semimetals by comparing two models with contrasting spectral properties. We demonstrate that a spatially varying tilt in the Weyl cone structure creates an effect analogous to the tilting of light cones near a gravitational black hole horizon. By analyzing wave packet dynamics in both models, we reveal two fundamentally different types of analog horizons. The first model exhibits complete wave packet reflection, effectively mimicking an impenetrable barrier. In contrast, the second model permits wave packet transmission across the horizon. Critically, for both models, wave packets initialized with zero momentum ($k_0=0.0$) experience the strongest horizon effects, characterized by a dramatic slowing and significantly longer dwell times at the horizon region. Finally, we find that both systems exhibit substantial probability loss, which we demonstrate is directly correlated with the wave packet's dwell time near the horizon. Our findings establish tilted Weyl semimetals as a rich, tunable platform for investigating non-trivial quantum effects and information dynamics associated with analog black hole horizons.

AI.tldr: 倾斜外尔半金属中可实现两种不同类型的模拟黑洞视界，一种完全反射波包，另一种允许波包穿越视界。零动量波包在视界区域表现出最强的效应，包括显著减速和长时间停留。
AI.motivation: 探索在倾斜外尔半金属中实现模拟黑洞视界的可能性，研究不同光谱特性的模型如何产生不同类型的量子效应和信息动力学。
AI.method: 通过比较两种具有不同光谱特性的模型，分析外尔锥结构的空间变化倾斜如何产生类似黑洞视界附近光锥倾斜的效应。研究波包动力学，特别关注零动量波包在视界区域的行为。
AI.result: 发现两种不同类型的模拟视界：第一种模型表现出完全波包反射，模拟不可穿透的屏障；第二种模型允许波包穿越视界。零动量波包在视界区域经历最强的效应，包括显著减速和长时间停留。两种系统都表现出显著的概率损失，这与波包在视界附近的停留时间直接相关。
AI.conclusion: 倾斜外尔半金属为研究模拟黑洞视界的非平凡量子效应和信息动力学提供了一个丰富、可调控的平台，揭示了不同类型视界行为的可能性。

title: Pairing Mechanism in Bilayer Nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ Superconductors
summary: The recent discovery of superconductivity with $T_c \approx 80$~K in bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ provides a new setting in which to test the organizing principles of unconventional high-temperature superconductivity. We show that the gene principle and the collaborative Fermi-surface rule which were previously proposed to unify unconventional high temperature superconductors, extend naturally to this bilayer, multi-orbital system. We identify that there are two antiferromagnetic exchange channels that can provide the dominant pairing force: an interlayer intra-orbital nearest-neighbour exchange $J_\perp$ between $d_{z^2}$ orbitals mediated by the inner apical oxygen, and an intralayer inter-orbital nearest-neighbour exchange $J_{xz}$ between $d_{z^2}$ and $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbitals mediated by the in-plane oxygen. Owing to the bilayer bonding--antibonding splitting and the $B_{1g}$ symmetry of the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, these two channels cooperate to produce a robust $s^\pm$ superconducting state with an internal sign reversal between mirror-even and mirror-odd Fermi-surface pockets in momentum space. Both pairing channels maximize the superconducting gap on the $β$ pocket with a form factor $(cosk_x-cosk_y)^2$ in momentum space. The result places La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ within a unified framework for unconventional superconductivity while revealing a distinct electronic environment for high-$T_c$ pairing.

AI.tldr: 双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇的超导机制符合先前提出的基因原理和协作费米面规则，其s±超导态由两个反铁磁交换通道协同产生。
AI.motivation: La₃Ni₂O₇在80K附近发现超导性，为检验非常规高温超导的组织原理提供了新平台。研究旨在验证先前提出的基因原理和协作费米面规则是否适用于这种双层多轨道系统。
AI.method: 通过分析双层镍酸盐的电子结构，识别出两个主要的反铁磁交换配对通道：层间d_z²轨道间的J⊥交换（通过内顶端氧介导）和层内d_z²与d_x²-y²轨道间的J_xz交换（通过面内氧介导）。利用双层键合-反键合分裂和d_x²-y²轨道的B1g对称性，研究这两个通道如何协作产生s±超导态。
AI.result: 两个配对通道协同产生稳健的s±超导态，在动量空间中镜面对称偶数和奇数费米面口袋之间具有内部符号反转。两个通道都在β口袋上最大化超导能隙，其动量空间形式因子为(cosk_x-cosk_y)²。
AI.conclusion: La₃Ni₂O₇的超导机制符合非常规超导的统一框架，同时揭示了高温配对的新颖电子环境，将双层镍酸盐纳入了非常规超导的统一理论体系。

title: Band mixing and particle-hole asymmetry in moiré fractional Chern insulators
summary: We investigate the effect of remote band mixing on the stability of fractional Chern insulators in a family of models that approximate continuum descriptions of moiré materials. Our results suggest that the experimentally observed asymmetry between filling fractions $ν=1/3$ and $ν=2/3$ in twisted MoTe$_2$ originates from a competition between a fractional Chern insulator, an electron Wigner crystal, and a hole Wigner crystal. In the absence of band mixing, the leading instability at $ν= 1/3$ is the electron crystal, whereas at $ν= 2/3$ the main competing phase is the hole crystal. Remote band mixing substantially lowers the energy of the electron crystal but has only a weak effect on the hole crystal. Consequently, it destabilizes the fractional Chern insulator at $ν=1/3$ more strongly than at $ν=2/3$. This mechanism also provides an explanation for the emergence of re-entrant integer quantum anomalous Hall states in moiré MoTe$_2$ for fillings $ν>1/2$.

AI.tldr: 远程能带混合对分数陈绝缘体稳定性的影响：在ν=1/3时电子维格纳晶体占主导，ν=2/3时空穴维格纳晶体占主导，远程能带混合显著降低电子晶体能量，导致ν=1/3时分数陈绝缘体更不稳定。
AI.motivation: 研究远程能带混合对分数陈绝缘体稳定性的影响，解释扭曲MoTe₂中观察到的ν=1/3和ν=2/3填充率之间的不对称性，以及ν>1/2时重新出现的整数量子反常霍尔态。
AI.method: 使用近似连续介质描述的莫尔材料模型家族，研究远程能带混合对分数陈绝缘体、电子维格纳晶体和空穴维格纳晶体之间竞争的影响。
AI.result: 无远程能带混合时，ν=1/3主要竞争相是电子晶体，ν=2/3主要竞争相是空穴晶体。远程能带混合显著降低电子晶体能量但对空穴晶体影响微弱，导致ν=1/3时分数陈绝缘体更不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 远程能带混合通过不对称地影响电子和空穴维格纳晶体的能量，解释了扭曲MoTe₂中ν=1/3和ν=2/3的不对称性，并为ν>1/2时重新出现的整数量子反常霍尔态提供了机制解释。

title: Solution of the Ising model with Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions by the transfer matrix method
summary: The square lattice Ising model under the Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions is a well-known exactly solvable lattice model. The exact solution of this system has been derived within the framework of Pfaffian-type method. In this paper we provide a derivation for the solution by the Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method in the transfer matrix formalism. We set special interactions on the boundaries and take certain limit of these interactions, so that the system under the Brascamp-Kunz boundary conditions is transformed into another system under the toroidal boundary conditions. The Schultz-Mattis-Lieb method is applied to the mapping system and the partition function is exactly solved in the fermionic representation. The Fisher zeros are analytically calculated and the physical critical point is identified. We also discuss the difference between the transfer matrix approaches to the Brascamp-Kunz and to the toroidal boundary conditions. Our work introduces a member to the family of transfer-matrix-based studies for Ising model under various boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文使用Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法，通过特殊边界相互作用和极限变换，将Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下的Ising模型转化为环面边界条件模型，精确求解了配分函数并分析了Fisher零点。
AI.motivation: Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下的Ising模型已有Pfaffian方法精确解，但缺乏基于转移矩阵的Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法推导。本文旨在填补这一空白，扩展转移矩阵方法在不同边界条件下的应用。
AI.method: 在转移矩阵形式下，设置特殊边界相互作用并取极限，将Brascamp-Kunz边界条件转化为环面边界条件。然后应用Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法，在费米子表示中精确求解配分函数，并解析计算Fisher零点。
AI.result: 成功推导出Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下Ising模型的精确解，确定了物理临界点，并分析了不同边界条件下转移矩阵方法的差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Ising模型在不同边界条件下的转移矩阵研究家族增添了新成员，展示了Schultz-Mattis-Lieb方法在Brascamp-Kunz边界条件下的适用性。

title: Predicting Solvation Free Energies of Molecules and Ions via First-Principles and Machine-Learning Molecular Dynamics
summary: The solvation free energy (SFE) of molecules and ions is a fundamental property governing their solvation behavior and solubility. Molecular simulations offer a route to compute SFEs using alchemical free energy methods, such as thermodynamic integration or free energy perturbation. However, these methods suffer from the infamous end-point singularity, which leads to numerical instability when atoms approach closely, a challenge that becomes particularly acute in ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations. Here, we introduce the bubble method to calculate the SFEs of molecules and ions from first principles. Our approach avoids the end-state problem in both ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations and is applicable to molecules and ions of arbitrary shape. When calculating the SFEs of ions using periodic density functional theory, we incorporate corrections for the neutralizing background charge, spurious interactions between periodic images, and the vacuum-water interface potential. To validate our method, we successfully computed the SFEs of methane, methanol, water, and sodium ions using classical, ab initio, and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations. Importantly, our method requires no experimental inputs or empirical data. This makes it particularly well-suited for studying systems under extreme conditions, such as high pressure-temperature environments or under nanoconfinement, situations where experimental investigations are challenging and classical force fields, typically parameterized under ambient conditions, may be unreliable.

AI.tldr: 提出"气泡法"计算分子和离子的溶剂化自由能，避免传统自由能计算方法中的端点奇异性问题，适用于从头算和机器学习分子动力学模拟。
AI.motivation: 溶剂化自由能是分子和离子溶解行为的关键性质，传统热力学积分和自由能微扰方法存在端点奇异性问题，特别是在从头算和机器学习分子动力学模拟中数值不稳定。
AI.method: 开发气泡法计算溶剂化自由能，避免端点问题；在周期性密度泛函理论计算中，考虑背景电荷校正、周期性镜像相互作用和真空-水界面电势；适用于任意形状的分子和离子。
AI.result: 成功计算了甲烷、甲醇、水和钠离子的溶剂化自由能，验证了方法在经典、从头算和机器学习分子动力学模拟中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 气泡法无需实验输入或经验数据，特别适用于极端条件（高压高温、纳米约束）下的系统研究，这些情况下传统力场可能不可靠。

title: Quantum Computing of Phonon Spectra and Thermal Properties of Crystalline Solids
summary: Variational quantum algorithms offer a promising framework for solving eigenvalue problems on near-term quantum hardware, yet their applicability beyond electronic structure calculations remains relatively unexplored. In this work, we investigate the quantum computing of lattice vibrational and thermodynamical properties by applying the variational quantum eigensolver and variational quantum deflation to phonon Hamiltonians derived from first-principles force constants obtained using density functional theory. The mass-weighted dynamical matrix is mapped onto a qubit-encoded Hermitian operator, enabling computation of the full set of acoustic and optical phonon branches of crystalline silicon and graphene using a reduced qubit register and direct benchmarking against classical diagonalization. The quantum-computed phonon spectrum is further used to evaluate vibrational entropy, constant-volume specific heat, and thermal expansion coefficient, reproducing expected low-temperature quantum behavior and the high-temperature Dulong-Petit limit. We further demonstrate that combined error mitigation strategies help recover phonon dispersions and thermodynamic behavior consistent with expected trends on near-term quantum hardware. Although classical phonon methods remain computationally superior, our results establish phonon-based thermodynamics as a stringent and physically transparent benchmark for assessing variational quantum algorithms on near-term quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 该论文将变分量子算法应用于声子哈密顿量，计算晶体硅和石墨烯的晶格振动与热力学性质，为近量子设备上的变分量子算法提供了物理透明的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 变分量子算法在电子结构计算之外的应用相对较少被探索。该研究旨在将变分量子算法扩展到晶格振动和热力学性质的计算领域，为近量子设备上的量子算法提供严格的物理基准测试。
AI.method: 使用变分量子本征求解器和变分量子降阶法处理从密度泛函理论获得的第一性原理力常数导出的声子哈密顿量。将质量加权动力学矩阵映射到量子比特编码的厄米算符，使用减少的量子比特寄存器计算声子谱，并结合误差缓解策略。
AI.result: 成功计算了晶体硅和石墨烯的完整声子谱（声学和光学支），并进一步评估了振动熵、定容比热和热膨胀系数，再现了低温量子行为和高温Dulong-Petit极限。误差缓解策略有助于在近量子硬件上恢复与预期趋势一致的声子色散和热力学行为。
AI.conclusion: 虽然经典声子方法在计算上仍具有优势，但该研究建立了基于声子的热力学作为评估近量子设备上变分量子算法的严格且物理透明的基准测试框架。

title: The origin and promise of transition metal dichalcogenide hosted single photon emitters for quantum technologies
summary: Single photon emitters (SPEs) are integral parts of several quantum technology implementations. Over the past decade or so, monolayers of transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) have emerged as one of the promising candidates for SPE platforms with attractive characteristics. To move ahead, it is necessary to understand the atomistic origin of SPEs in TMDCs - a topic which is highly debated with contradicting proposals. In this paper, we critically review these existing proposals to elucidate their origin. Further, we perform a critical trend analysis for different figures of merit of TMDC-based SPEs, and propose a characterization methodology to streamline the reporting process. Finally, we review several quantum technology implementations where solid state SPEs are being used, and identify the advancements required in TMDC-based SPEs for their successful adoption in these technologies.

AI.tldr: 该论文对过渡金属二硫化物（TMDCs）中单光子发射器（SPEs）的原子起源进行了批判性综述，分析了现有争议理论，提出了表征方法标准化建议，并评估了TMDC-SPEs在量子技术中的应用前景。
AI.motivation: TMDCs作为有前景的单光子发射器平台，但其原子起源存在高度争议和矛盾的理论，阻碍了该领域的发展。需要澄清这些争议并建立标准化的表征方法，以推动TMDC-SPEs在量子技术中的应用。
AI.method: 1. 批判性综述TMDCs中SPEs原子起源的现有争议理论；2. 对TMDC-SPEs的不同性能指标进行趋势分析；3. 提出标准化的表征方法以规范报告流程；4. 综述固态SPEs在量子技术中的应用，并识别TMDC-SPEs需要改进的方向。
AI.result: 通过系统分析，澄清了TMDCs中SPEs起源的理论争议，建立了性能指标的趋势分析框架，提出了标准化的表征方法，并明确了TMDC-SPEs在量子技术应用中需要解决的关键技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解TMDCs中SPEs的原子起源提供了清晰的理论框架，建立了标准化的表征方法，并指明了TMDC-SPEs在量子技术应用中需要突破的技术瓶颈，为该领域的进一步发展奠定了基础。

title: Collective Resonance of Superconducting/Normal Domain Walls in the Intermediate State of type-I superconductor
summary: The dynamics of phase boundaries, such as superconducting/normal (S/N) interfaces in type-I superconductors, are typically obscured in conventional magnetic measurements, which are dominated by surface barriers and over-damped flux processes. Here, we employ ac magnetostriction as a sensitive probe to reveal the distinct bulk dynamics of these domain walls in the intermediate state of lead. In contrast to the Debye-type relaxation observed in magnetic susceptibility, we discover a pronounced quasiresonant response characterized by a sign reversal of the imaginary component and a non-monotonic evolution of the real part with frequency. We attribute this behavior to the collective oscillations of S/N interfaces driven by eddy currents generated within the normal domains. This work uncovers a fundamental dynamical channel in superconducting modulated phases and establishes ac magnetostrictive coefficient as a powerful tool for probing hidden interface physics.

AI.tldr: 使用交流磁致伸缩技术揭示了铅中间态中超导/正常界面(S/N界面)的集体振荡动力学，发现了准共振响应特征
AI.motivation: 传统磁测量方法受表面势垒和过阻尼通量过程主导，难以揭示I型超导体中相边界（如S/N界面）的体动力学行为
AI.method: 采用交流磁致伸缩作为灵敏探针，研究铅中间态中S/N界面的动力学行为
AI.result: 发现了与磁化率中Debye型弛豫不同的准共振响应：虚部符号反转，实部随频率非单调演化
AI.conclusion: 该行为源于正常畴内涡流驱动的S/N界面集体振荡，揭示了超导调制相中的基本动力学通道，建立了交流磁致伸缩系数作为探测隐藏界面物理的有力工具

title: Experimental Signatures of Topological Transport in Polycrystalline FeSi Thin Films
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures, 1 appendix with supplemental material (submitted to Applied Materials Today)
summary: Disorder in any form is considered to be highly detrimental to the experimental exploration of novel phenomena in quantum materials with non-trivial band topology. Contrary to established belief, clear topological features are reliably detected in the electron transport of polycrystalline 65-nm-thick ε-FeSi films grown via solid-state reaction of Fe deposited on a Si(100) substrate. The observation of temperature-independent anomalous Hall conductivity σ_{xy}^{AHE} \sim const (σ_{xx)) (σ_{xy}^{AHE} \approx 14 uS/sq.) below 200 K firmly proves the anomalous Hall effect in this compound to be intrinsic and originating from a non-trivial Berry phase. The discovered scaling dominates over the nanoscale (\sim 40 nm) polycrystalline texture and is robust to temperature crossover between bulk and surface modes of electron transport. The non-trivial topological state of ε-FeSi is also confirmed by a chiral anomaly both in anisotropic longitudinal magnetoresistance and planar Hall effect specific for Weyl semimetals. Relating scaled anomalous Hall conductance to a "quantized" Hall response of a Weyl semimetal the distance between two Weyl points has been estimated as (k_{+}^{W}-k_{-}^{W})/(2π) \approx 0.36. Our findings confirm the topological origin of electron transport in the polycrystalline ε-FeSi thin films and discover its potential as a new high temperature and noble metal-free Weyl semimetal.

AI.tldr: 在ε-FeSi多晶薄膜中意外发现拓扑特征，证明其具有高温、无贵金属的Weyl半金属特性
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为无序会破坏量子材料中的拓扑特性，但本研究挑战这一观念，探索在多晶材料中实现拓扑特性的可能性
AI.method: 通过固态反应在Si(100)衬底上生长65纳米厚的多晶ε-FeSi薄膜，测量电子输运性质，包括反常霍尔效应、手征反常的各向异性纵向磁阻和平面霍尔效应
AI.result: 观察到温度无关的反常霍尔电导率（σ_{xy}^{AHE} ≈ 14 μS/sq），证明反常霍尔效应是内禀的且源于非平凡贝里相位；发现手征反常特征；估算Weyl点间距为(k_{+}^{W}-k_{-}^{W})/(2π) ≈ 0.36
AI.conclusion: ε-FeSi多晶薄膜具有拓扑起源的电子输运特性，是一种新型高温、无贵金属的Weyl半金属，无序并不总是破坏拓扑特征

title: Fundamental temperature in the superstatistical description of non-equilibrium steady states
summary: Among the statistical mechanical frameworks able to describe systems in non-equilibrium steady states such as collisionless plasmas, self-gravitating systems and other complex systems, superstatistics have gained recent attention. Superstatistics postulates a superposition of canonical systems with inverse temperatures $β$ described by a probability distribution depending on the external conditions. Unfortunately, the uncertainty about $β$ cannot be attributed to fluctuations of a phase space function, and this suggests that the distribution of $β$ is purely of statistical nature and must be inferred rather than measured. This lack of direct observability of the superstatistical temperature then becomes a conceptual issue in need of resolution. In this work we address this issue, showing that a mapping exists between functions of the superstatistical temperature and functions of the recently proposed fundamental temperature, a model-dependent function of the energy, in such a way that their expectation values coincide. We illustrate the use of this mapping by computing the conditional distribution of inverse temperature given energy for the $q$-canonical ensemble, as well as the full inverse temperature distribution, without the use of Laplace inversion.

AI.tldr: 该论文解决了超统计中温度不可直接观测的问题，通过建立超统计温度与基本温度之间的映射关系，使得它们的期望值一致。
AI.motivation: 超统计框架用于描述非平衡稳态系统（如无碰撞等离子体、自引力系统等），但超统计温度β的不确定性无法归因于相空间函数的涨落，其分布具有纯统计性质且无法直接观测，这成为一个需要解决的概念性问题。
AI.method: 建立超统计温度函数与基本温度函数之间的映射关系，使得它们的期望值一致。基本温度是最近提出的能量依赖函数。通过这种映射，无需拉普拉斯逆变换即可计算条件分布和完整分布。
AI.result: 成功建立了超统计温度与基本温度之间的映射关系，并以此计算了q正则系综中给定能量的逆温度条件分布以及完整的逆温度分布。
AI.conclusion: 该映射关系解决了超统计温度不可直接观测的概念性问题，为超统计框架提供了更坚实的理论基础，并简化了相关分布的计算过程。

title: Crystal Anisotropy Implications on the Magneto-Optical Properties of van der Waals FePS3
summary: Antiferromagnetic FePS3 has recently gained significant interest in its potential applications in spin-related devices. Here, we show that in-plane structural anisotropy has a major impact in shaping the optical responses of FePS3 single-crystals from the bulk form down to the monolayer limit. X-ray diffraction on a bulk FePS3 crystal confirms a distorted FeS6 octahedron causing inequivalent Fe-Fe distances and consequently resulting in a higher a/b lattice parameter ratio. Micro-photoluminescence observations on bulk and monolayer FePS3 reveal four emissions: one intra-atomic d-d transition (band A, centered at ~1.24 eV) and three p-d charge transfer transitions (bands B, C, and D, centered around ~1.79 eV, ~2.3 eV, and ~2.56 eV, respectively). These bands exhibit different polarization behaviors, which persist down to the monolayer limit. Density functional theory calculations from bulk to monolayer FePS3 reveal the underlying electronic structure, assign the observed emissions, and indicate why these peaks have contrasting linear and circular polarization responses. These results establish a direct structure-optics relation in FePS3, highlighting the strong coupling between lattice anisotropy, electronic transitions, and symmetry-selective optical selection rules.

AI.tldr: FePS3单晶从体块到单层极限都展现出面内结构各向异性对光学响应的显著影响，通过X射线衍射、微光致发光和密度泛函理论揭示了晶格各向异性、电子跃迁和对称性选择光学选择规则之间的强耦合关系。
AI.motivation: 研究反铁磁FePS3材料的结构各向异性如何影响其光学响应，从体块到单层极限，为自旋相关器件应用提供基础理解。
AI.method: 采用X射线衍射分析体块FePS3晶体结构，微光致发光观测体块和单层FePS3的光学发射，结合密度泛函理论计算从体块到单层的电子结构。
AI.result: 发现FeS6八面体畸变导致不等价Fe-Fe距离和更高的a/b晶格参数比；观察到四个发射带：一个d-d跃迁（~1.24 eV）和三个p-d电荷转移跃迁（~1.79 eV，~2.3 eV，~2.56 eV）；这些带表现出不同的偏振行为并持续到单层极限；理论计算揭示了电子结构并解释了偏振响应的差异。
AI.conclusion: 在FePS3中建立了直接的结构-光学关系，强调了晶格各向异性、电子跃迁和对称性选择光学选择规则之间的强耦合，为自旋电子学应用提供了重要见解。

title: A Chemical Space Perspective on Diastereomeric Barriers in Alkylperoxy-to-Hydroperoxyalkyl Isomerization
summary: Low-temperature hydrocarbon autooxidation involves radical intermediates whose reactivity depends not only on the stereochemistry of the intermediates themselves, but also on that of the transient species encountered along the reaction path. This study offers large-scale evidence for the importance of stereochemistry in low-temperature autooxidation by propagating stereochemical information from 498 C1-C7 hydrocarbons through radical formation, $\mathrm{O_2}$ addition, and the isomerization of alkylperoxy ROO radicals to hydroperoxyalkyl QOOH radicals. The resulting dataset comprises density-functional-theory-level data for 5,356 species, including 2,324 cyclic diastereomeric transition states associated with 1,162 unique ROO -> QOOH isomerization reactions, with transition-state connectivity confirmed by intrinsic reaction coordinate analysis. Explicit stereochemical treatment reveals that diastereomeric pathways may be either degenerate or separated by more than 60 kcal/mol, with the magnitude of these differences governed by steric strain at the carbon bearing the peroxyl group. These results show that constitutionally collapsed molecular representations can systematically miss kinetically relevant reactive channels and provide a foundation for stereochemistry-aware mechanism generation, rate estimation, and predictive combustion modeling.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过大规模计算化学分析，揭示了立体化学在低温烃类自氧化反应中的关键作用，特别是ROO→QOOH异构化反应的立体异构过渡态能量差异可达60 kcal/mol以上。
AI.motivation: 传统燃烧模型通常忽略立体化学信息，采用简化的分子表示方法，这可能系统性地遗漏动力学相关反应通道。本研究旨在通过大规模计算分析，量化立体化学对低温烃类自氧化反应的影响。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论计算，从498个C1-C7烃类出发，追踪立体化学信息通过自由基形成、O₂加成和ROO→QOOH异构化反应的传播过程。构建了包含5,356个物种的数据集，包括2,324个环状非对映异构过渡态，并通过内禀反应坐标分析确认过渡态连接性。
AI.result: 非对映异构反应路径的能量差异范围很大，从简并到超过60 kcal/mol不等。这些差异主要由过氧基团所在碳原子的空间应变控制。立体化学的明确处理揭示了传统简化分子表示会系统性地遗漏动力学相关反应通道。
AI.conclusion: 立体化学在低温自氧化反应中至关重要，忽略立体化学会导致反应机制生成、速率估计和燃烧模型预测的系统性误差。本研究为考虑立体化学的机制生成、速率估计和预测性燃烧建模提供了基础。

title: Polarized light Raman scattering by an atom near an ultrathin periodically aligned carbon nanotube film
summary: We present a systematic theoretical study of the Raman scattering effect for a two-level atomic system in near proximity of an ultrathin dielectric film with an embedded parallel array of periodically aligned single-wall semiconducting carbon nanotubes. More generally, our model provides a unified description of the quantum near-field medium-assisted enhancement effects for in-plane anisotropic metasurfaces, of which ultrathin periodically aligned carbon nanotube films are the representative example. Particular attention is given to incoming photon parameters of the external light radiation such as polarization and incidence plane orientation relative to the main anisotropy axis (nanotube alignment axis). By explicitly deriving the Raman scattering cross-section, we establish that for the two-level atomic system in the near-field zone of the carbon nanotube metasurface the effect can be enhanced by a factor of up to 10^4, not only for p-polarized but for s-polarized light as well.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了双能级原子系统在超薄周期性排列碳纳米管薄膜附近的拉曼散射效应，发现近场效应可将散射增强高达10^4倍。
AI.motivation: 研究各向异性超表面（以周期性排列碳纳米管薄膜为代表）对量子近场介质辅助增强效应的统一描述，特别关注外部光辐射参数（偏振和入射平面方向）相对于各向异性主轴的影响。
AI.method: 通过理论建模，推导双能级原子系统在碳纳米管超表面近场区的拉曼散射截面，分析不同偏振态（p偏振和s偏振）和入射方向下的增强效应。
AI.result: 在碳纳米管超表面近场区，双能级原子系统的拉曼散射效应可增强高达10^4倍，不仅适用于p偏振光，也适用于s偏振光。
AI.conclusion: 周期性排列碳纳米管薄膜作为各向异性超表面的代表，能显著增强近场量子效应，为量子光学和纳米光子学应用提供了重要理论依据。

title: Anisotropic Superconducting Diode Effect in Planar Josephson Junctions
summary: We theoretically investigate the magnetic and crystalline anisotropies of the superconducting diode effect (SDE) in proximitized planar Josephson junctions (JJs) with coexisting Rashba and Dresselhaus spin-orbit couplings (SOCs) under an in-plane magnetic field. A symmetry analysis identifies geometric constraints on magnetic-field and crystallographic orientations for which the SDE is suppressed independently of field strength, providing experimentally testable signatures of the interplay between SOC and Zeeman interaction. We develop a phenomenological model showing that the diode efficiency depends on the relative alignment between spin-orbit and magnetic fields, and corroborate this behavior in the narrow-junction, low-field regime using an analytical approach that links the anisotropy of the diode response to SOC-induced Fermi surface distortions and anisotropic Cooper pair momentum. These findings are supported by tight-binding simulations of the Bogoliubov-de Gennes equation, which reproduce recent experimental trends. The simulations reveal that electrostatic gating can induce polarity reversals of the SDE in the low-field regime even with only Rashba SOC, consistent with recent experiments, and predict additional reversals for specific field orientations, junction geometries, and SOC ratios. Our results elucidate the origin of anisotropic nonreciprocal superconducting transport and provide guidance for experimentally probing the mechanisms underlying the SDE in semiconductor-based planar JJs.

AI.tldr: 该理论研究平面约瑟夫森结中超导二极管效应的磁性和晶体各向异性，揭示了自旋轨道耦合与塞曼相互作用之间的相互作用，并预测了通过静电门控可实现SDE极性反转。
AI.motivation: 研究平面约瑟夫森结中超导二极管效应的各向异性特性，理解自旋轨道耦合与塞曼相互作用如何共同影响非互易超导输运，为实验探测SDE机制提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用对称性分析确定SDE被抑制的几何约束条件，建立唯象模型描述二极管效率与自旋轨道和磁场相对取向的关系，在窄结低场区使用解析方法，并通过Bogoliubov-de Gennes方程的紧束缚模拟验证理论。
AI.result: 理论分析识别出磁场和晶体取向的几何约束条件，在这些条件下SDE被抑制；模拟显示静电门控可在低场区诱导SDE极性反转，即使只有Rashba自旋轨道耦合；预测了特定场取向、结几何和SOC比例下的额外反转。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了各向异性非互易超导输运的起源，为实验探测半导体基平面约瑟夫森结中SDE的机制提供了指导，揭示了自旋轨道耦合与塞曼相互作用在决定超导二极管效应中的关键作用。

title: Static and Dynamic Electronic Properties and the Possible Magnetic Structure of the $4f^3$-$Γ_6$ System NdCo2Zn$_{18}$Ga$_2$ Investigated Using $^{59}$Co Nuclear Quadrupole Resonance
summary: We report $^{59}$Co nuclear quadrupole resonance (NQR) measurements on the Nd-based compound NdCo$_2$Zn$_{18}$Ga$_2$, which undergoes an antiferromagnetic transition at $T_{\rm N} = 1.5$ K. Although the NQR spectra show no detectable change across $T_{\rm N}$, the nuclear spin-lattice relaxation rate, $1/T_1$, exhibits a clear anomaly at $T_{\rm N}$. An analysis based on the alignment of the Nd moments demonstrates that the internal magnetic fields generated by these moments cancel each other at the Co sites. If the nearest-neighbor Nd moments align antiferromagnetically, this finding suggests that Ga substitution removes magnetic frustration, thereby increasing $T_{\rm N}$.

AI.tldr: 通过59Co核四极共振测量研究NdCo2Zn18Ga2，发现其在TN=1.5K发生反铁磁转变，NQR谱无变化但自旋-晶格弛豫率1/T1在TN处有明显异常，表明Nd磁矩产生的内磁场在Co位点相互抵消。
AI.motivation: 研究NdCo2Zn18Ga2化合物的反铁磁转变特性，特别是通过核四极共振技术探测磁性转变过程中局域磁环境的变化，理解Ga替代对磁结构和转变温度的影响。
AI.method: 使用59Co核四极共振(NQR)测量技术，在低温下(包括TN=1.5K附近)测量NQR谱和核自旋-晶格弛豫率1/T1，分析Nd磁矩排列对内磁场分布的影响。
AI.result: NQR谱在TN处无明显变化，但1/T1在TN处显示明显异常；分析表明Nd磁矩产生的内磁场在Co位点相互抵消；如果最近邻Nd磁矩反铁磁排列，则Ga替代消除了磁挫败，从而提高了TN。
AI.conclusion: Ga替代通过消除磁挫败改变了NdCo2Zn18Ga2的磁结构，导致反铁磁转变温度TN升高，同时Nd磁矩排列使得在Co位点的内磁场相互抵消，这解释了NQR谱不变但弛豫率异常的现象。

title: Activation and Avalanche Length Scales in the Finite-Temperature Creep of an Elastic Interface
summary: We investigate the creep dynamics of a driven elastic line at finite temperature, well below the depinning threshold. We show that creep is governed by two distinct length scales. The first, $\ell_{\mathrm{opt}}$, corresponds to the optimal activated rearrangements that control the dynamics' bottleneck and remains essentially temperature-independent. The second, $\ell_{\mathrm{av}}$, characterizes the spatial extent of thermally activated avalanches and grows as temperature decreases. By combining structural and dynamical observables, we show that $\ell_{\mathrm{av}}$ governs both the crossover in the structure factor and the growth of the four-point dynamical susceptibility, while the relaxation time remains controlled by activation over large barriers associated with $\ell_{\mathrm{opt}}$. We find that the avalanche scale follows $\ell_{\mathrm{av}}(T)\sim T^{-ν_{\mathrm{dep}}}$, thereby selecting a unique scenario among competing theoretical predictions. These results establish a unified picture of finite-temperature creep in which activation controls temporal scales while depinning criticality governs spatial correlations.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了驱动弹性线在有限温度下蠕变动力学的双尺度机制：最优激活重排尺度ℓ_opt控制时间尺度，而热激活雪崩尺度ℓ_av控制空间关联，后者随温度降低而增长。
AI.motivation: 研究驱动弹性线在远低于钉扎阈值温度下的蠕变动力学，旨在理解有限温度下弹性系统的激活动力学机制，特别是空间关联与时间尺度之间的分离现象。
AI.method: 通过结合结构可观测量和动力学可观测量，分析弹性线的蠕变行为。研究两个特征长度尺度：控制动力学瓶颈的最优激活重排尺度ℓ_opt，以及表征热激活雪崩空间范围的ℓ_av。
AI.result: 发现ℓ_av控制结构因子中的交叉和四点动力学磁化率的增长，而弛豫时间仍由与ℓ_opt相关的大势垒激活控制。雪崩尺度遵循ℓ_av(T)∼T^{-ν_dep}，在竞争理论预测中选择了一个独特方案。
AI.conclusion: 建立了有限温度蠕变的统一图像：激活控制时间尺度，而钉扎临界性控制空间关联，揭示了蠕变动力学中时空分离的本质特征。

title: The Origin of Linearly-Polarized Photoluminescence in WS2/WSe2 Moiré superlattices
summary: Reliable optical control of valley degrees of freedom in moire excitons requires that the emitted polarization faithfully reflect the underlying valley state. Here, we show that linearly polarized photoluminescence from WS2/WSe2 moiré excitons is largely insensitive to the excitation polarization and therefore is not primarily governed by valley-contrast selection rules. Automated polarization-resolved photoluminescence and Raman mapping at cryogenic temperatures reveal that the degree of linear polarization correlates strongly with local Raman shifts and moiré-exciton observables, identifying strain as the dominant experimental correlate. Exhaustive linear-regression analysis further shows that strain-related descriptors provide the best prediction of the observed polarization. Guided by theory, we attribute this behavior to strain-amplified breaking of C3 symmetry in the moire potential: weak uniaxial strain produces only partial cancellation of locally elliptical emission, yielding a finite far-field degree of linear polarization. These results establish strain as a key control parameter for reliable optical readout in TMD moire superlattices.

AI.tldr: 应变是控制TMD莫尔超晶格中激子线性偏振发射的关键参数，而非谷选择规则
AI.motivation: 研究WS2/WSe2莫尔激子的偏振发射特性，以确定其是否忠实反映底层谷态，这对于可靠的光学谷控制至关重要
AI.method: 使用低温下自动偏振分辨光致发光和拉曼映射技术，结合线性回归分析，将偏振度与局部拉曼位移和莫尔激子观测值相关联
AI.result: 线性偏振发射与激发偏振无关，主要与应变相关；应变相关描述符能最好地预测观测到的偏振；弱单轴应变导致局部椭圆发射的部分抵消，产生有限远场线性偏振度
AI.conclusion: 应变是TMD莫尔超晶格中可靠光学读出的关键控制参数，应变放大了莫尔势中C3对称性的破缺

title: Spin State versus Potential of Zero Charge as Predictors of Density-Dependent Oxygen Reduction in M-N-C Electrocatalysts
summary: Metal-site density strongly influences oxygen reduction activity and selectivity in M-N-C electrocatalysts, but the descriptors that predict these trends remain under debate. Here, we compare spin state and the potential of zero charge as predictors of density-dependent oxygen reduction behavior in Fe-N-C and Co-N-C catalysts. Using constrained-magnetization calculations combined with Landau analysis, we find that the ground-state magnetic moments vary only weakly across a broad range of metal-site densities, suggesting that magnetic descriptors alone cannot account for the pronounced performance changes. In contrast, explicit-solvent simulations reveal systematic density-dependent shifts in PZC, which alter the interfacial electric field and thereby modulate field-sensitive adsorption energetics of ORR intermediates. Incorporating these PZC shifts into a pH-field-coupled microkinetic model captures the density-dependent activity trends and reproduces the experimentally observed increase in two-electron selectivity at lower site densities under acidic conditions. Experimental PZC measurements further support the predicted trend. Together, these results show that PZC is a more effective predictor than spin state for density-dependent oxygen reduction activity and selectivity in M-N-C electrocatalysts.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现电位零点(PZC)比自旋态更能有效预测M-N-C电催化剂中金属位点密度依赖的氧还原活性和选择性。
AI.motivation: 金属位点密度强烈影响M-N-C电催化剂的氧还原活性和选择性，但预测这些趋势的描述符仍存在争议。研究旨在比较自旋态和电位零点作为密度依赖氧还原行为的预测因子。
AI.method: 采用约束磁化计算结合Landau分析确定基态磁矩；使用显式溶剂模拟研究PZC变化；将PZC变化纳入pH-场耦合微动力学模型；进行实验PZC测量验证预测趋势。
AI.result: 基态磁矩在宽密度范围内变化微弱，表明磁性描述符无法解释性能显著变化；PZC随密度发生系统性变化，改变界面电场并调节ORR中间体的场敏感吸附能；微动力学模型成功捕捉密度依赖活性趋势并重现实验观察的低位点密度下双电子选择性增加；实验PZC测量支持预测趋势。
AI.conclusion: 电位零点(PZC)比自旋态更能有效预测M-N-C电催化剂中密度依赖的氧还原活性和选择性，PZC变化通过改变界面电场影响ORR中间体的吸附能，从而调控催化性能。

title: Quantum higher-spin Hall insulators
summary: We develop a theory of quantum spin Hall insulators with arbitrary spin $J$. Our analysis demonstrates that such systems support $J+\tfrac{1}{2}$ pairs of helical edge modes protected by nontrivial mirror Chern numbers. We establish that the corresponding edge theory is described by a generalized Dirac fermion with higher-order dispersion. These modes produce unique transport responses that are non-linear with voltage. An in-plane magnetic field opens a mass gap in the edge spectrum, and magnetic domain walls host $(J+\tfrac{1}{2})$-fold degenerate bound states characterized by nontrivial winding numbers. Our results extend quantum spin Hall physics to higher-spin systems and suggest possible realizations in ultracold atomic gases.

AI.tldr: 该论文发展了任意自旋J的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体理论，发现系统支持J+1/2对螺旋边缘态，具有高阶色散和非线性输运响应。
AI.motivation: 将量子自旋霍尔物理扩展到高自旋系统，探索在超冷原子气体中的可能实现。
AI.method: 发展任意自旋J的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体理论，分析镜像陈数保护机制，建立广义狄拉克费米子边缘理论。
AI.result: 系统支持J+1/2对螺旋边缘态，具有高阶色散和非线性电压输运响应；面内磁场打开边缘谱质量隙，磁畴壁存在(J+1/2)重简并束缚态。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将量子自旋霍尔物理推广到高自旋系统，为超冷原子气体实现提供了理论框架。

title: Metal Atom (Dis)Order and Superconductivity in YCaH$_{n}$ ($n=8-20$) High-Pressure Superhydrides
summary: High-pressure superhydrides have attracted much attention due to their high superconducting critical temperatures ($T_\text{c}$s). Herein, density functional theory (DFT) calculations are used to study the structures and properties, including potential for metal atom disorder and doping-enhanced $T_\text{c}$, within Y-Ca superhydrides with YCaH$_{n}$ ($n=8-20$) compositions. For YCaH$_8$ numerous phases that differed in the arrangement of the metal atoms were found to be nearly isoenthalpic, suggesting the importance of configurational entropy on stability. The equimolar ratio of the two metal atoms brought the Fermi level to a peak in the density of states, enhancing $T_\text{c}$ to 149~K and 170~K for $P4/mmm$ and $Cmmm$ YCaH$_{8}$, respectively, at 180~GPa within the isotropic Eliashberg formalism. YCaH$_{12}$ was also predicted to be disordered, however the $T_\text{c}$s of the ordered variants spanned a wide range from 105-253~K at 200~GPa, showing that doping could either mildly enhance or drastically reduce $T_\text{c}$ from that of the parent compounds. For YCaH$_{18}$ and YCaH$_{20}$, only a single dynamically stable superhydride was predicted, which we attribute to the differences in the structures of the stable binary parents.

AI.tldr: 通过DFT计算研究Y-Ca超氢化物的结构、金属原子无序性及掺杂增强的超导临界温度，发现YCaH₈存在多种近等焓相，YCaH₁₂的无序性导致Tc变化范围大，而YCaH₁₈和YCaH₂₀仅预测到单一稳定结构。
AI.motivation: 高压超氢化物因其高临界温度而备受关注，但金属原子无序性和掺杂对超导性能的影响尚不明确。本研究旨在通过DFT计算探究Y-Ca超氢化物的结构、金属原子无序性及其对超导临界温度的影响。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算研究YCaHₙ（n=8-20）的结构和性质，包括金属原子无序性和掺杂增强的Tc。使用各向同性Eliashberg形式主义计算超导临界温度。
AI.result: YCaH₈存在多种金属原子排列不同的近等焓相，表明构型熵对稳定性重要；等摩尔金属原子比例使费米能级位于态密度峰值，在180 GPa下P4/mmm和Cmmm相的Tc分别达149K和170K。YCaH₁₂也预测为无序，有序变体的Tc在200 GPa下范围为105-253K。YCaH₁₈和YCaH₂₀仅预测到单一动态稳定超氢化物。
AI.conclusion: Y-Ca超氢化物中金属原子无序性对结构和稳定性有重要影响，掺杂可以显著增强或降低超导临界温度，具体取决于化合物的结构和金属原子比例。不同氢化物表现出不同的无序行为和Tc响应。

title: Orbital glass conceals missing magnetic entropy in a relativistic Mott insulator
summary: Coupling between different degrees of freedom (DOF) in an electronic material leads to exotic phases of matter characterized by complex and competing order parameters as well as emergent excitations. Building a microscopic understanding of these order parameters and their mutual relationship is hindered by the fact that different orders often mask each others' response to conventional experimental probes. Here, we reveal how to disentangle responses from distinct orders that arise from the coupling between the spin and orbital DOF. Our method uses a phase sensitive technique that measures ground state properties by independently resolving interactions of different symmetries. This allows us to directly detect an orbital glass state caused by competing interactions in the $5d^1$ relativistic Mott insulator Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$. We observe short-range orbital order up to 380 K and a dramatic increase of orbital dispersion near the magnetic phase transition. This orbital dispersion generates a directional ordering, $\textit{i.e.}$, it forms an orbital nematic state which breaks the rotational symmetry of the crystal. We establish that the orbital nematic state induces the magnetic ordering. The presence of this short-range orbital order well above the magnetic phase transition solves the long-standing puzzle of missing entropy in this material.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种相位敏感技术，用于解耦自旋和轨道自由度的响应，在Ba₂NaOsO₆中发现了轨道玻璃态和轨道向列态，并证明轨道向列态诱导了磁有序。
AI.motivation: 电子材料中不同自由度之间的耦合导致复杂的相变和竞争序参量，但传统实验手段难以区分不同序参量的响应，阻碍了对这些序参量及其相互关系的微观理解。
AI.method: 使用相位敏感技术，通过独立解析不同对称性的相互作用来测量基态性质，从而解耦自旋和轨道自由度的响应。
AI.result: 在Ba₂NaOsO₆中发现了高达380K的短程轨道有序，在磁相变附近观察到轨道色散的显著增加，形成了轨道向列态（破坏晶体旋转对称性），并证明轨道向列态诱导了磁有序。
AI.conclusion: 该技术成功解耦了自旋和轨道自由度的响应，揭示了轨道向列态诱导磁有序的机制，解决了该材料中长期存在的熵缺失难题。

title: Self-averaging parameter estimation for coarse-grained particle models
summary: We introduce a parameter estimation method that utilizes microscopic data, specifically averages and correlations of selected microscopic observables, to determine the parameters of a stochastic differential equation governing coarse-grained degrees of freedom. The method is not limited to static parameters found in the reversible part of the coarse-grained dynamics, such as those in the free energy function or potential of mean force, but also extends to dynamic parameters, including friction coefficients. The method couples the stochastic differential equation with free parameters to dynamic equations for the parameters.
