The coupled system self-averages, according to Anosov-Kifer's theorem, in such a way that the final state of the parameters gives coincidence between the microscopic and mesoscopic averages and correlations of selected observables. The method is validated in two examples: a Brownian particle in a harmonic potential, and a set of Brownian particles interacting hydrodynamically with the Rotne-Prager-Yamakawa mobility tensor. This latter case illustrates how the method can be used not only to determine coefficients but also state dependent transport properties - in this case, the position dependent form of the mobility tensor. The parameter estimation for these two models yields excellent results. Subsequently we use the methodology to study a bimodal-mass Lennard-Jones fluid for which we infer both the potential of mean force between the heavy particles and its hydrodynamic mobility tensor.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用微观数据（选定观测量平均值和相关函数）估计粗粒化随机微分方程参数的方法，可同时确定静态参数（如自由能）和动态参数（如摩擦系数）。
AI.motivation: 现有参数估计方法通常只关注静态参数（如自由能函数），难以同时估计动态参数（如摩擦系数、迁移率张量）。需要一种能利用微观数据同时确定粗粒化随机微分方程中所有参数的方法。
AI.method: 将带自由参数的随机微分方程与参数动态方程耦合，利用Anosov-Kifer定理使系统自平均化，最终使参数状态达到微观与介观选定观测量平均值和相关函数的一致。
AI.result: 方法在布朗粒子谐振势和流体动力学相互作用（Rotne-Prager-Yamakawa迁移率张量）两个示例中得到验证，参数估计结果优异。进一步应用于双峰质量Lennard-Jones流体，成功推断重粒子间的平均力势及其流体动力学迁移率张量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效利用微观数据同时估计粗粒化随机微分方程的静态和动态参数，包括状态依赖的输运性质，为复杂系统的参数估计提供了通用框架。

title: On the Energy Dissipation in the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert Equation
summary: The dynamics of magnetization near a stable equilibrium in ferromagnetic nanomagnets are examined within the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert (LLG) framework. For a small angle precession, the dependence of ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) frequency, the damping constant and the resulting quality factor $Q$ of the resonance on the local curvature around the free-energy minimum is systematically analyzed. Special attention is devoted to the behavior of the FMR decay time in the vicinity of bifurcation points, where the number of metastable energy minima changes and the commonly used approximation for the quality factor $Q\simeq 1/2α$ (where $α$ denotes the Gilbert damping) fails.

AI.tldr: 研究铁磁纳米磁体中磁化动力学，分析FMR频率、阻尼常数和品质因子Q在自由能最小值附近的局部曲率依赖性，特别关注分岔点附近的FMR衰减时间行为。
AI.motivation: 在Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert框架下研究铁磁纳米磁体的磁化动力学，特别关注当系统接近分岔点时，常用的品质因子近似Q≈1/2α失效的情况，需要更精确地理解FMR特性与自由能局部曲率的关系。
AI.method: 在LLG框架内分析小角度进动，系统研究FMR频率、阻尼常数和品质因子Q对自由能最小值附近局部曲率的依赖性，特别关注分岔点附近的行为。
AI.result: 建立了FMR特性与自由能局部曲率的系统关系，揭示了在分岔点附近常用近似Q≈1/2α失效的原因，为理解铁磁纳米磁体在复杂能量景观中的动力学行为提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 铁磁纳米磁体的FMR特性强烈依赖于自由能最小值附近的局部曲率，特别是在分岔点附近，需要超越简单阻尼近似来准确描述共振行为，这对纳米磁体器件设计和应用具有重要意义。

title: Photocurrent at oblique illumination and reconstruction of wavefront direction with 2d photodetectors
summary: Many contemporary photodetectors operate beyond the readout of light intensity and enable the reconstruction of spectrum and polarization at the single-pixel level. However, the determination of light incidence direction with reconstructive detectors has not been realized so far. We show that photodetectors based on symmetric junctions of metals and 2d electron systems (2DES) enable (1) zero-bias photocurrent at oblique light incidence (2) reconstruction of incidence direction based on photocurrent measurements at variable carrier density. The former effect is based on peculiar electrodynamics of metal-contacted 2DES, where spatial variations of incident field phase translate into strong variations of local field amplitude. The local absorbances at two opposite metal-2DES junctions at oblique incidence are dissimilar, which results in finite photocurrent independent of microscopic rectification mechanism at these junctions. The direction of photocurrent uniquely determines the quadrant of light incidence. Quantitative determination of incidence angle becomes possible under conditions of 2d plasmon resonance at variable carrier density. In such a case, obliquely incident radiation excites the asymmetric plasmon modes, which amplitude carries unique information about angle of incidence.

AI.tldr: 基于金属-2DES对称结的光电探测器可实现零偏压光电流和入射方向重构
AI.motivation: 现有光电探测器能重建光谱和偏振信息，但无法确定光入射方向，需要开发能同时测量光强度和方向的新型探测器
AI.method: 使用金属与二维电子系统（2DES）的对称结结构，通过测量不同载流子密度下的光电流来重建入射方向
AI.result: 实现了零偏压下的斜入射光电流，光电流方向能唯一确定入射象限，在二维等离子体共振条件下可定量确定入射角度
AI.conclusion: 金属-2DES对称结光电探测器首次实现了光入射方向的测量，为多功能单像素光电探测提供了新途径

title: Pairing properties of correlated three-leg ladders with strong interchain couplings near 1/3 filling
summary: We investigate the ground-state properties of correlated three-leg ladders near 1/3 filling. We apply the density-matrix renormalization group method to the three-leg t-J ladder with strong interchain couplings and evaluate its pairing nature. When holes are doped into the spin-gapped state at 1/3 filling, we find that pair correlations develop with power-law decays while spin correlations decay exponentially. On the other hand, doping of electrons into the 1/3-filled state does not give rise to substantial pair correlations. We also discuss the hole-doped state in the three-leg Hubbard model to compare it with the pairing state in the t-J model. Our numerical demonstrations provide insights into the electronic properties of trilayer nickelate superconductors.

AI.tldr: 研究三腿t-J梯子在1/3填充附近的基态性质，发现空穴掺杂会产生幂律衰减的配对关联，而电子掺杂则不会产生显著配对关联。
AI.motivation: 研究三腿梯子模型在1/3填充附近的关联电子性质，为理解三层镍酸盐超导体的电子特性提供理论见解。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重整化群方法研究强链间耦合的三腿t-J梯子模型，并对比三腿Hubbard模型中的空穴掺杂态。
AI.result: 空穴掺杂到1/3填充的自旋能隙态中会产生幂律衰减的配对关联，而自旋关联呈指数衰减；电子掺杂则不会产生显著的配对关联。
AI.conclusion: 三腿梯子模型在空穴掺杂时表现出配对倾向，这为理解三层镍酸盐超导体的超导机制提供了重要线索。

title: Chiral Magnetism and Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect in a Low-energy Kondo Model on the Triangular Lattice
summary: We study an effective low-energy Kondo model on the triangular lattice in which itinerant electrons occupy a valence pocket at $Γ$ and three conduction pockets at the $M$ points of the Brillouin zone. This construction has a Fermi-surface nesting structure that favors triple-$Q$ magnetic order while only assuming the low-energy band-structure. Treating the local moments as classical spins on a four-sublattice magnetic unit cell, we find extended regions of non-coplanar order, including tetrahedral and related canted tetrahedral states, in addition to ferromagnetic and coplanar phases. The chiral phases remain stable over a broad range of inter-pocket Kondo couplings and persist in the presence of an external magnetic field. For certain chiral orders, the electronic bands can become gapped and host a quantum anomalous Hall state with $σ_{xy}=4\,e^2/h$. These results show that chiral magnetism and a quantized anomalous Hall effect on the triangular lattice do not rely on a specific tight-binding band structure, but can arise more generally from low-energy nested pockets at $Γ$ and $M$.

AI.tldr: 在三角晶格上研究低能Kondo模型，发现嵌套费米面结构可导致非共面磁序和量子反常霍尔效应，不依赖于特定紧束缚能带结构。
AI.motivation: 研究三角晶格上低能Kondo模型中，Γ点和M点费米面嵌套结构如何产生手性磁性和量子反常霍尔效应，探索这些现象是否依赖于特定紧束缚能带结构。
AI.method: 采用有效低能Kondo模型，其中巡游电子占据Γ点的价带口袋和M点的三个导带口袋。将局域磁矩视为经典自旋，在四子晶格磁单胞中处理，分析不同Kondo耦合下的磁序相图。
AI.result: 发现扩展的非共面磁序区域，包括四面体和相关倾斜四面体态，以及铁磁和共面相。手性相在宽范围的Kondo耦合和外部磁场下保持稳定。某些手性序下电子能带可打开带隙，实现量子反常霍尔态，霍尔电导σ_{xy}=4e²/h。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶格上的手性磁性和量子反常霍尔效应不依赖于特定紧束缚能带结构，而是源于Γ点和M点低能嵌套口袋的更普遍机制。

title: Stability and breakdown of chiral motion in non-reciprocal flocking
summary: We study a two-species Vicsek model with intra-species alignment and asymmetric inter-species couplings, where one species aligns with the other while the latter anti-aligns. Motivated by recent results showing that globally coherent chiral motion is not a generic large-scale state of finite-range non-reciprocal flocking, we ask whether a chiral state can nevertheless be stabilized in the discrete-time, metric, non-reciprocal two-species Vicsek model, and if so, under what conditions. For equal populations and motilities, we show that such a state exists only within a restricted window characterized by high density, very low self-propulsion speed, and small system size relative to the interaction range. Within this window, we also find that chirality appears primarily when aligning interactions dominate over anti-alignment, whereas stronger anti-alignment leads to species segregation and suppresses chirality. Conversely, introducing species asymmetry through population imbalance drives transitions from chiral states to porous parallel-flocking or anti-parallel-flocking liquids; motility imbalance induces asynchronous oscillations and, in extreme cases, leads to segregation into moving clusters of the faster species within a more dispersed background of slower particles. Overall, these results indicate that chirality in the non-reciprocal two-species Vicsek model arises within a restricted regime set by density, motility, inter-species coupling, and system size, rather than being a generic outcome of non-reciprocal interactions.

AI.tldr: 研究非互惠两物种Vicsek模型中手性运动的稳定性条件，发现手性状态仅存在于高密度、低速度、小系统的受限窗口内，且需要对齐相互作用占主导。
AI.motivation: 近期研究表明全局相干手性运动不是有限范围非互惠聚集的通用大尺度状态，因此探究在离散时间、度量、非互惠两物种Vicsek模型中手性状态能否稳定存在及其条件。
AI.method: 采用两物种Vicsek模型，包含物种内对齐和不对称物种间耦合（一物种对齐另一物种，后者反对齐）。研究种群平衡和不平衡、运动能力差异等条件下的系统行为。
AI.result: 手性状态仅存在于高密度、极低自推进速度、系统尺寸相对于相互作用范围较小的受限窗口内。手性主要出现在对齐相互作用主导时，强反对齐导致物种分离并抑制手性。种群不平衡驱动从手性状态向多孔平行或反平行聚集液体的转变；运动能力不平衡诱导异步振荡，极端情况下导致快速物种形成移动团簇。
AI.conclusion: 非互惠两物种Vicsek模型中的手性运动不是非互惠相互作用的通用结果，而是由密度、运动能力、物种间耦合和系统尺寸共同决定的受限机制产物。

title: Hierarchical spectral inhomogeneity in photoluminescence of a twisted MoSe2/WSe2 heterobilayer moiré superlattice revealed by hyperspectral mapping
summary: Low-temperature photoluminescence from MoSe2/WSe2 moiré superlattice often consists of a broad interlayer emission background with dense, narrow peaks, making microscopic line-by-line assignment difficult. Here, we use hyperspectral photoluminescence mapping and peak-decomposition-free spectral analyses to determine how this spectral complexity is organized in space. A 20 x 20 map acquired with a 400 nm pitch reveals three dominant spectral families that form contiguous real-space domains. Feature-wise spatial correlation analysis and whole-spectrum similarity yield a characteristic micron-scale length of 1.27-2.05 um, all exceeding the 0.85 um optical spot size. At the same time, individual pixels retain a dense, multi-peak structure, implying an unresolved local spectral manifold below optical resolution. Correlations among centroid, dominant energy, asymmetry, width, entropy, sharp fraction, and roughness indicate that the micron-scale energy landscape and local manifold complexity can be statistically separated, while remaining correlated across the map, consistent with a hierarchical organization of the emission spectrum. These results establish hierarchical inhomogeneity as an organizing principle of MoSe2/WSe2 moiré superlattice photoluminescence.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高光谱光致发光映射和无峰分解光谱分析，揭示了MoSe2/WSe2莫尔超晶格光致发光光谱的层次化不均匀性组织原则。
AI.motivation: MoSe2/WSe2莫尔超晶格在低温下的光致发光通常包含宽泛的层间发射背景和密集的窄峰，使得微观线对线分配变得困难。需要理解这种光谱复杂性在空间上是如何组织的。
AI.method: 使用高光谱光致发光映射（20×20地图，400纳米间距）和无峰分解光谱分析技术，包括特征空间相关分析和全光谱相似性分析。
AI.result: 发现了三个主导的光谱家族形成连续的真实空间域，特征长度为1.27-2.05微米，超过光学光斑尺寸（0.85微米）。单个像素仍保留密集的多峰结构，表明存在未解析的局部光谱流形。微米尺度能量景观和局部流形复杂性可以统计分离，但在整个地图上保持相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究确立了层次化不均匀性作为MoSe2/WSe2莫尔超晶格光致发光光谱的组织原则，揭示了光谱复杂性的空间层次结构。

title: Crystallography, Lorentz violation, and the Standard-Model Extension
summary: The motivation behind the present work is to adopt methodology from field theory and high-energy physics to crystallography. In particular, we establish a relationship between the electromagnetic sector of the Standard-Model Extension (SME) for Lorentz invariance violation and optical media. At an effective level, electromagnetic properties associated with different crystal structures are demonstrated to be parametrized in the SME. Crystallographic and magnetic point groups provide the mathematical tools to show this correspondence. Birefringent and magnetoelectric media merit a dedicated study. Intriguing effects, which have not been described systematically in the modern literature, are rediscovered for the latter and expressed in SME language. With the setting developed at our disposal, materials with specific symmetries such as birefringent or multiferroic crystals serve as condensed-matter analogs for SME effects. It enables us to propose materials with unusual optical properties, which have not been thoroughly looked at in recent times.

AI.tldr: 该研究将高能物理中的标准模型扩展（SME）与晶体学结合，建立了SME电磁部分与光学介质之间的对应关系，为研究洛伦兹不变性破坏提供了凝聚态类比系统。
AI.motivation: 将场论和高能物理的方法应用于晶体学，特别是建立标准模型扩展（SME）中洛伦兹不变性破坏的电磁部分与光学介质之间的对应关系，为研究基本物理对称性破坏提供新的实验平台。
AI.method: 利用晶体学和磁点群作为数学工具，将不同晶体结构的电磁性质参数化到SME框架中，特别关注双折射和磁电介质，并在SME语言中重新表达这些效应。
AI.result: 建立了SME参数与晶体光学性质之间的系统对应关系，重新发现了文献中未系统描述的磁电介质效应，并提出了具有特定对称性的材料（如双折射或多铁性晶体）作为SME效应的凝聚态类比。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究洛伦兹不变性破坏提供了新的实验途径，能够预测具有特殊光学性质的材料，并促进高能物理与凝聚态物理之间的交叉研究。

title: $0-π$ transitions in non-Hermitian magnetic Josephson junctions
comment: Regular article. 10 pages, 12 figures. Comments are welcome
summary: We study the transport properties of non-Hermitian magnetic Josephson junctions, considering a superconductor-quantum dot-superconductor device coupled to a ferromagnetic metallic reservoir in the presence of an external magnetic field. We focus on the $0-π$ transitions that occur when the equilibrium phase difference between the superconductors shifts from $φ=0$ to $φ=π$ upon increasing the magnetic field amplitude. The coupling to the environment induces spin-dependent dissipation and leads to the broadening of the junction Andreev levels. By combining Green's function calculations with an effective non-Hermitian description restricted to the sub-gap Andreev quasi-bound states, we show that dissipation shifts the $0-π$ transition to higher magnetic fields. Remarkably, also the relative angle between the applied field and the reservoir magnetization can be used to drive the transition, at fixed field magnitude. We demonstrate that this effect can be entirely ascribed to the behavior of the complex eigenvalues of the non-Hermitian Hamiltonian. These findings highlight non-Hermiticity as a resource that can introduce new control knobs for engineering the current-phase relation in superconducting junctions.

AI.tldr: 非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结中的0-π转变受耗散调控，耗散将转变推向更高磁场，且磁场与磁化相对角度也能驱动转变
AI.motivation: 研究非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结的输运特性，探索耗散环境如何影响超导结的0-π转变，为非厄米性作为调控资源提供理论基础
AI.method: 结合格林函数计算与限制在亚能隙Andreev准束缚态的有效非厄米描述，研究超导体-量子点-超导体器件耦合铁磁金属库的输运特性
AI.result: 耗散将0-π转变推向更高磁场；固定磁场强度下，外加磁场与库磁化相对角度也能驱动转变；这些效应可完全归因于非厄米哈密顿量复本征值行为
AI.conclusion: 非厄米性可作为工程超导结电流-相位关系的新调控资源，为超导器件设计提供新的控制手段

title: Monte Carlo Study of the Phase Transition of the $XY$ Model on a Diamond Lattice
summary: We study the phase transition of the classical $XY$ model on a diamond lattice by Monte Carlo simulations using the Wolff cluster algorithm. Finite-size scaling (FSS) analysis of the Binder cumulant and the second-moment correlation length ratio $ξ_{2\rm nd}/L$ yields $T_c = 1.30036(1)$ and $ν= 0.671(6)$. Data collapse of both quantities confirms the three-dimensional $XY$ universality class.

AI.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究金刚石晶格上经典XY模型的相变，确定相变温度Tc=1.30036(1)和临界指数ν=0.671(6)，证实属于三维XY普适类
AI.motivation: 研究金刚石晶格上经典XY模型的相变行为，验证其是否属于三维XY普适类，并精确确定相变参数
AI.method: 使用Wolff团簇算法的蒙特卡洛模拟，结合有限尺寸标度分析，通过Binder累积量和二阶关联长度比ξ_{2nd}/L进行相变分析
AI.result: 得到相变温度Tc=1.30036(1)，临界指数ν=0.671(6)，数据塌缩证实系统属于三维XY普适类
AI.conclusion: 金刚石晶格上的经典XY模型表现出三维XY普适类行为，临界指数与理论预测一致

title: Density Profiles and Direct Correlation Functions from Density Functional Theory in Binary Hard-Sphere Crystals: Substitutional Solid and Interstitial Solid Solution
summary: We determine the fully resolved equilibrium density profiles for two binary hard-sphere crystal structures using classical density functional theory through the White Bear II functional from fundamental measure theory. While for the substitutional crystal, in which some hard spheres are replaced by spheres of slightly smaller diameter, the density profiles are rather similar to the single-component case (narrow Gaussian peaks centered at fcc lattice sites), we observe a more complex behavior for the case of interstitial solid solutions, where the small species is fairly delocalized in the unit cell. Further, we compute the species-resolved inhomogeneous two-body direct correlation functions for these two types of binary crystals. The large-large components are mainly determined by the vacancy concentration $n_\text{vac}$ and show a characteristic magnitude $~1/n_\text{vac}$. Based on this observation, we propose a simple geometric picture of this six-dimensional function. The components of the direct correlation function involving the small spheres substantially differ in interstitial solid solutions from those of the substitutional crystal.

AI.tldr: 使用经典密度泛函理论（White Bear II泛函）研究二元硬球晶体的平衡密度分布和直接关联函数，发现置换型晶体与单组分情况相似，而间隙型固溶体中小组分高度离域化。
AI.motivation: 研究二元硬球晶体系统的微观结构，特别是不同晶体类型（置换型和间隙型）中密度分布和直接关联函数的差异，以深入理解多组分晶体系统的热力学性质。
AI.method: 使用经典密度泛函理论，具体采用基于基本测度理论的White Bear II泛函，计算两种二元硬球晶体结构的完全解析平衡密度分布和组分分辨的非均匀二体直接关联函数。
AI.result: 1. 置换型晶体的密度分布与单组分情况相似（窄高斯峰位于fcc晶格位点）；2. 间隙型固溶体中小组分在晶胞内高度离域化；3. 大-大组分的直接关联函数主要取决于空位浓度，特征幅度约为1/n_vac；4. 涉及小组分的直接关联函数在间隙型固溶体中与置换型晶体有显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 二元硬球晶体的微观结构强烈依赖于晶体类型：置换型晶体保持类似单组分的局域化结构，而间隙型固溶体表现出更复杂的离域行为。直接关联函数的分析为理解这些系统的热力学性质提供了新的几何图像。

title: Medium-Throughput Evaluation of Transport and Optical Responses in Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets provide a promising platform for unconventional transport and optical responses beyond conventional ferromagnets and antiferromagnets. In this work, we develop a medium-throughput first-principles workflow to evaluate transport and optical properties in approximately 150 known altermagnetic compounds collected from the MAGNDATA database. By combining density functional theory, Wannier interpolation, and symmetry analysis, we investigate representative linear and nonlinear responses, including the anomalous Hall effect, magneto-optical Kerr effect, and bulk photovoltaic effect. We find that these responses are strongly constrained by magnetic symmetry and further shaped by spin-orbit coupling, band structure, and inversion symmetry breaking. Representative examples include a finite anomalous Hall response in metallic VNb3S6, giant Kerr rotation in insulating CaIrO3, and large shift current in non-centrosymmetric CuFeS2. These results establish a symmetry-guided route for identifying experimentally accessible fingerprints and functional transport properties in altermagnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了一个高通量计算工作流，评估了约150种反铁磁化合物的输运和光学性质，发现这些响应受磁对称性强烈约束，并受自旋轨道耦合、能带结构和反演对称性破缺影响。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁材料在非常规输运和光学响应方面具有超越传统铁磁和反铁磁材料的潜力，但目前缺乏系统性的性质评估方法。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论、Wannier插值和对称性分析，开发了中等通量的第一性原理工作流，评估了MAGNDATA数据库中约150种已知反铁磁化合物的输运和光学性质。
AI.result: 发现反铁磁材料的线性与非线性响应（反常霍尔效应、磁光克尔效应、体光伏效应）受磁对称性强烈约束，并受自旋轨道耦合、能带结构和反演对称性破缺影响。具体例子包括：金属性VNb3S6中的有限反常霍尔响应、绝缘体CaIrO3中的巨大克尔旋转、非中心对称CuFeS2中的大位移电流。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为识别反铁磁材料中实验可观测的特征信号和功能性输运性质建立了对称性指导的途径。

title: Microscopic Theory of Acoustic Phonon Scattering by Charge-Density-Wave Fluctuations
summary: Charge-density-wave (CDW) order in correlated metals originates in a peaked electronic susceptibility at a finite wavevector $\mathbf Q_0$, set either by Fermi-surface features (nesting or saddle-point singularities) or by momentum-resolved electron-phonon coupling, or by a combination of the two. CDW precursor fluctuations can attenuate heat-carrying acoustic phonons even when long-range order is absent. We develop a Green's-function theory in which a damped-harmonic-oscillator propagator for a hybrid CDW--lattice soft mode at the ordering wavevector $\mathbf Q_0$ and a strain--intensity vertex obtained from an electron loop combine to give the acoustic phonon self-energy. The theory identifies two scattering channels: a local-intensity channel, controlled by a retarded composite CDW response and giving a narrow critical contribution when the CDW correlation length is large, and a texture (gradient) channel, which couples acoustic strain to spatial variations of the CDW envelope and, in a frozen-texture limit, reduces to a phenomenological form set by the measured diffraction peak weight and width. The same propagator fixes the lattice projection of a hybrid CDW--phonon soft pole measured by inelastic X-ray scattering, with an underdamped-to-overdamped crossover controlled by the distance to the CDW instability and a mass-tracking identity for the slow overdamped relaxation rate. The framework unifies diffraction, soft-mode spectroscopy, and thermal transport and applies broadly across CDW materials, including the transition-metal dichalcogenides, rare-earth tritellurides, kagome CDW compounds, and the cuprate fluctuating charge-order regime; we illustrate it by direct comparison with experimental IXS phonon softening and anomalous thermal transport in 2H-TaSe$_2$ at elevated temperatures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一描述电荷密度波（CDW）材料中声子软化、热输运和软模光谱的理论框架，通过格林函数方法将衍射、软模光谱和热输运联系起来。
AI.motivation: CDW材料中声子软化和热输运异常现象需要统一的理论解释。现有理论难以同时描述CDW涨落对声子衰减的影响、软模光谱特征以及热输运异常。
AI.method: 发展格林函数理论，使用CDW-晶格混合软模的阻尼谐振子传播子，结合从电子环获得的应变-强度顶点，计算声子自能。理论识别两个散射通道：局部强度通道（受延迟复合CDW响应控制）和纹理（梯度）通道。
AI.result: 理论框架成功统一了衍射、软模光谱和热输运现象，能够描述CDW相关长度大时的临界散射，并在冻结纹理极限下还原为唯象形式。理论预测了软模的欠阻尼到过阻尼交叉，并通过2H-TaSe₂的实验数据验证。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为理解CDW材料中的声子软化、热输运异常和软模行为提供了统一框架，适用于过渡金属二硫化物、稀土三碲化物、Kagome CDW化合物和铜氧化物等多种材料体系。

title: Superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates: a review of recent progress, focusing on thin films
summary: The discovery of superconductivity with Tc ~ 80 K in the nickelate Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer La3Ni2O7 at high pressure has opened a new platform for unconventional superconductivity, followed by the subsequent observation of superconductivity in trilayer La4Ni3O10, also at high pressure. Remarkably, ambient-pressure superconductivity was also observed recently in La3Ni2O7 ultra-thin films when grown on substrates that provide compressive strain. This discovery significantly extends the type of experimental techniques that can be used in nickelates, previously limited due to the high-pressure constraint. Discussing the similarities and differences among these nickel oxides will provide new insights into understanding the mechanism of high-Tc superconductivity in correlated electron systems. In this paper, we review the experimental and theoretical progress on RuddlesdenPopper nickelates, with emphasis on thin films, and discuss future perspectives and research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐超导体的实验和理论进展，重点关注薄膜研究，并讨论了未来展望。
AI.motivation: 镍酸盐超导体的发现为非常规超导研究提供了新平台，特别是薄膜中常压超导的发现突破了高压限制，扩展了实验技术手段，有助于理解强关联电子系统中的高温超导机制。
AI.method: 本文采用综述方法，系统回顾了Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐的实验和理论进展，特别关注薄膜研究，通过比较不同镍氧化物的异同来深入分析。
AI.result: 总结了双层La3Ni2O7在高压下约80K的超导性、三层La4Ni3O10的高压超导性，以及La3Ni2O7超薄膜在衬底压应变下的常压超导性等重要发现。
AI.conclusion: 镍酸盐超导体的研究为理解高温超导机制提供了新视角，薄膜中常压超导的发现突破了技术限制，未来需要进一步探索不同镍氧化物的异同，推动强关联电子系统超导机制的研究。

title: Enhanced Anomalous Nernst Effect in the Ferromagnetic Kondo Lattice CeCo2As2
summary: The anomalous Nernst effect (ANE), generating a voltage perpendicular to a temperature gradient due to magnetization, is closely linked to the Berry curvature (BC) near the Fermi energy in topological magnets. We report an enhanced spontaneous ANE in the ferromagnetic Kondo lattice CeCo2As2, which features Kondo-screened cerium-based 4f moments embedded in a ferromagnetic d-electron framework. The observed large anomalous Nernst coefficient, greater than the Seebeck coefficient, is attributed to the strong BC present in the f-orbital-dominated flat bands. The enhanced ANE in CeCo2As2 serves as a signature of the Fermi energy pinning within the topological flat band, highlighting the correlation-driven topology in the Kondo lattice.

AI.tldr: 在铁磁近藤晶格CeCo2As2中观测到增强的自发反常能斯特效应，该效应源于f轨道主导的拓扑平带中的强贝里曲率，标志着费米能级被钉扎在拓扑平带内。
AI.motivation: 反常能斯特效应与拓扑磁体费米能级附近的贝里曲率密切相关，研究近藤晶格中的反常能斯特效应可以揭示关联驱动的拓扑特性。
AI.method: 研究铁磁近藤晶格CeCo2As2，该系统具有近藤屏蔽的铈基4f磁矩嵌入铁磁d电子框架中，通过测量反常能斯特系数和塞贝克系数来分析效应。
AI.result: 观测到大的反常能斯特系数（大于塞贝克系数），这归因于f轨道主导的平带中存在的强贝里曲率，表明费米能级被钉扎在拓扑平带内。
AI.conclusion: CeCo2As2中增强的反常能斯特效应是近藤晶格中关联驱动拓扑特性的标志，为研究拓扑平带中的贝里曲率效应提供了重要平台。

title: Fractional motions of an active particle on the quantum vortex
summary: We analytically investigate the diffusive motion inferred from experimental observations of active particles driven by quantum vortices on the surface of superfluid helium. We first study the dynamical behavior of an active particle subject to a viscoelastic memory effect characterized by a power-law kernel. We then analyze the dynamics of an active particle under a uniform vortex force, thermal noise, and viscous dissipation subject to a power-law kernel. Next, by including a harmonic confining force, we obtain analytical solutions for the joint probability density in two distinct time regimes.

AI.tldr: 研究超流氦表面量子涡旋驱动活性粒子的扩散运动，分析具有幂律核的粘弹性记忆效应下的动力学行为
AI.motivation: 理解实验观测到的超流氦表面量子涡旋驱动活性粒子的扩散运动机制，特别是粘弹性记忆效应的影响
AI.method: 首先研究具有幂律核粘弹性记忆效应的活性粒子动力学；然后分析均匀涡旋力、热噪声和粘性耗散下的粒子运动；最后加入谐波约束力，在两个不同时间区域获得联合概率密度的解析解
AI.result: 获得了具有幂律核粘弹性记忆效应的活性粒子动力学解析解，以及在两个不同时间区域的联合概率密度解析表达式
AI.conclusion: 通过解析方法成功描述了超流氦表面量子涡旋驱动活性粒子的扩散运动，揭示了粘弹性记忆效应对粒子动力学的重要影响

title: Unraveling the significance of Raman modes, Gruneisen parameters and phonon lifetimes in the hexagonal allotropes of Silicon and Germanium compounds
summary: Advancement in quantum information and quantum technologies has ushered in a new era of technological revolution in large scale atomistic simulation and efficient system on a chip device fabrication. This has led to innovative ways of harnessing rigorous search algorithms for functional quantum materials and steered scientists to dig deeper into the world of quantum phenomenon and applications. In this work, we delineate the advanced electronic structure and vibrational properties utilizing the popular meta-GGA functionals, spectral signatures of the Raman active phonon modes, explored their average mean free paths, and whether they conserve helicity, by leveraging first principles density functional theory and density functional perturbation theory. A systematic analysis of the role of phonon lifetimes, consequences of phonon-phonon and three phonon scattering rates and phonon linewidths have been presented. Further, a study of the the frequency and temperature dependent Gruneisen parameter has been employed in conjecture with the temperature dependent thermal expansion and thermal conductivity to portray the effect of anharmonicity in the phonon spectra of these two materials. Finally, we provide strategies for tuning the properties of these materials in an effort to improve their efficacy for advanced thermoelectric, photovoltaic and optoelectronic device applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文使用第一性原理计算研究量子材料的电子结构、振动性质、声子输运和热学性能，为热电、光伏和光电器件应用提供优化策略。
AI.motivation: 量子信息技术的发展推动了量子材料研究的需求，需要深入理解量子现象及其在原子尺度模拟和芯片器件制造中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理密度泛函理论（DFT）和密度泛函微扰理论（DFPT），使用meta-GGA泛函分析电子结构和振动性质，研究声子寿命、散射率、线宽以及温度相关的Grüneisen参数。
AI.result: 系统分析了两种材料的声子寿命、声子-声子散射、三声子散射率、声子线宽，以及温度相关的热膨胀和热导率，揭示了声子谱中的非谐性效应。
AI.conclusion: 提出了调控材料性能的策略，以提高其在先进热电、光伏和光电器件应用中的效能，为量子材料设计提供了理论基础。

title: Magnetoresistance from decoherence
summary: Microscopic theories of magnetoresistance have traditionally focused on momentum relaxation and the plasma frequency of itinerant electrons. Here, we uncover a distinct mechanism in which magnetoresistance originates from quantum decoherence throughout the whole Fermi sea, specifically the decay of the off-diagonal components of the density matrix. The resulting conductivity, parameterized by two complex decoherence times, scales linearly with impurity density-markedly contrasting the conventional Drude picture, where conductivity is governed by momentum relaxation of Ferm-surface quasiparticles and is inversely proportional to impurity density. This unconventional scaling provides a direct electrical probe of quantum decoherence, a quantity central to both fundamental studies and emerging nanoscale technologies. Furthermore, the interplay between the external magnetic field and the exchange field gives rise to rich magnetotransport phenomena, including temperature-drive crossover from positive to negative magnetoresistance and a nonmonotonic temperature dependence with a conductivity maximum reminiscent of the Kondo effect. Our results establish quantum decoherence as a key ingredient in magnetoresistance and our findings should have an unprecedented impact on advancing research and applications involving magnetoresistance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于量子退相干而非传统动量弛豫的新型磁阻机制，揭示了磁阻与杂质密度呈线性比例关系的非传统标度行为。
AI.motivation: 传统磁阻理论主要关注动量弛豫和巡游电子的等离子体频率，但本文旨在探索量子退相干在整个费米海中作为磁阻起源的新机制。
AI.method: 通过分析密度矩阵非对角分量的衰减，提出由两个复数退相干时间参数化的电导率理论，该理论显示电导率与杂质密度呈线性关系。
AI.result: 发现电导率与杂质密度呈线性比例的非传统标度关系，可作为量子退相干的直接电学探针；观察到温度驱动的正负磁阻交叉转变和非单调温度依赖性等丰富磁输运现象。
AI.conclusion: 量子退相干是磁阻的关键成分，这一发现将对磁阻相关的基础研究和纳米技术应用产生深远影响。

title: Magnetic-fluctuation-driven suppression of spin-orbit hybridization in the surface ferromagnet GdAg$_2$/Ag(111)
summary: Magnetic materials hosting topological band structures have attracted intense interest due to the interplay between magnetism and spin-orbit coupling (SOC). Here, using temperature- and polarization-dependent angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we investigate the surface ferromagnet GdAg$_2$/Ag(111), a two-dimensional system with Weyl-nodal-line-like band crossings. We find that spin fluctuations preserve the nodal-line-derived band crossings even above the Curie temperature, while SOC-induced hybridization develops only at low temperatures, as evidenced by spectral-weight redistribution. The suppression of the hybridization at high temperature is attributed to spin decoherence and band-dependent scattering, captured by an effective non-Hermitian framework. Our results establish magnetic fluctuations as a control knob for SOC-induced hybridization and associated Berry curvature, and highlight magnetic systems as a platform for exploring non-Hermitian band physics.

AI.tldr: 磁性材料GdAg₂/Ag(111)中，自旋涨落维持了Weyl-节线能带交叉，而SOC诱导的杂化仅在低温下出现，高温下因自旋退相干而抑制，这为探索非厄米能带物理提供了平台。
AI.motivation: 研究磁性材料中拓扑能带结构，探索磁性与自旋轨道耦合的相互作用，理解自旋涨落对SOC诱导杂化的调控作用。
AI.method: 使用温度和偏振依赖的角度分辨光电子能谱研究GdAg₂/Ag(111)表面铁磁体，结合有效非厄米框架分析自旋退相干和能带依赖散射。
AI.result: 自旋涨落在居里温度以上仍维持节线衍生的能带交叉，而SOC诱导的杂化仅在低温下通过谱权重再分布显现，高温下杂化被抑制。
AI.conclusion: 自旋涨落可作为SOC诱导杂化和Berry曲率的调控手段，磁性系统为探索非厄米能带物理提供了重要平台。

title: Emergent nonreciprocity in open thermodynamically-consistent chemical reaction networks
summary: Nonreciprocity, a hallmark of nonequilibrium systems, can generate dynamics not possible near thermodynamic equilibrium, including oscillatory and rotating patterns. The onset of temporal oscillations is often evident in linearized dynamics, where nonreciprocity appears as complex eigenvalues of an asymmetric Jacobian. Here, we show that the topology of open, thermodynamically-consistent chemical reaction networks can result in oscillatory instabilities near nonequilibrium steady states. These instabilities arise from chemostat-induced breaking of Onsager reciprocity, while the local equilibrium hypothesis preserves the variational structure of the dissipative part of the dynamics. Numerical results confirm that such nonreciprocity in reaction-diffusion systems produces oscillatory dynamics that nevertheless minimize a free energy.

AI.tldr: 化学反应网络拓扑结构可导致非平衡稳态附近的振荡不稳定性，这种非互易性源于化学恒化器打破昂萨格互易性，同时局部平衡假设保留了耗散部分的变分结构。
AI.motivation: 研究非互易性如何在不违反热力学一致性的情况下产生振荡动力学，特别是在开放化学反应网络中，探索拓扑结构如何影响非平衡稳态的稳定性。
AI.method: 分析开放热力学一致化学反应网络的拓扑结构，研究化学恒化器如何打破昂萨格互易性，同时保持局部平衡假设下的变分结构，并通过数值模拟验证反应扩散系统中的振荡动力学。
AI.result: 化学反应网络的拓扑结构确实能在非平衡稳态附近产生振荡不稳定性，这种非互易性源于化学恒化器打破昂萨格互易性，数值模拟证实反应扩散系统能产生最小化自由能的振荡动力学。
AI.conclusion: 开放化学反应网络的拓扑结构可在保持热力学一致性的前提下产生振荡不稳定性，为理解非平衡系统中的非互易性和振荡模式提供了新视角。

title: Influence of Ni substitution on the phase transitions and magnetocaloric effect of NdCo2 at cryogenic temperatures
comment: Accepted to Physical Review B (17.04.2026), but not yet published. 11 pages manuscript, 14 pages supplementary. 9 figures manuscript, 14 figures supplementary
summary: We have investigated NdCo2-xNix cubic Laves compounds with 0 <= x <= 1 using neutron diffraction and bulk magnetization measurements to study the influence of partial Ni substitutions of Co on the phase transitions and the magnetocaloric effect. Upon cooling, NdCo2 undergoes a cubic to tetragonal transition at 100 K, and a tetragonal to orthorhombic transition at 42 K. The transitions are associated with long-range ferromagnetic ordering of the magnetic moments along the c axis and spin reorientation into the ab plane, respectively. Both transitions shift to lower temperatures as the Ni content x increases. For x >= 0.5, the orthorhombic phase is suppressed. Additionally, there was a reduction in the magnetic moment upon increasing the Ni substitution of Co. The magnetocaloric effect was determined both indirectly and directly, with good agreement between the methods. NdCo2 exhibits an adiabatic temperature change of 6.3 K for a field of 20 T, which is decreased to 4.9 K for NdCoNi for the same field strength due to the reduced magnetic moment upon Ni substitution.

AI.tldr: 研究了NdCo2-xNix立方Laves化合物的相变和磁热效应，发现Ni替代Co会降低相变温度、抑制正交相、减小磁矩，从而降低磁热效应。
AI.motivation: 研究部分Ni替代Co对NdCo2立方Laves化合物的相变行为和磁热效应的影响，探索通过化学替代调控材料性能的可能性。
AI.method: 使用中子衍射和体磁化测量研究NdCo2-xNix化合物（0≤x≤1），通过间接和直接方法确定磁热效应。
AI.result: Ni替代使立方-四方相变和四方-正交相变温度降低，当x≥0.5时正交相被抑制；磁矩随Ni含量增加而减小；NdCo2在20T磁场下绝热温变为6.3K，NdCoNi降至4.9K。
AI.conclusion: Ni替代Co会降低NdCo2的相变温度、抑制正交相、减小磁矩，从而降低材料的磁热效应性能，为调控磁热材料性能提供了重要参考。

title: Dynamical spin-nematic order in a transverse field Ising chain with non-Hermitian Gamma interaction
summary: We investigate the effect of non-Hermitian Gamma interaction on the phase transitions and magnetic correlations for the transverse field Ising chain. We demonstrate that apart from the gapped ferromagnetic and paramagnetic phases, there is a gapless phase, where the system exhibits long-range spin-nematic order induced by parity-time symmetry breaking. Furthermore, we reveal that the parity-time symmetry breaking leads to the emergence of dynamical spin-nematic order, which also suggests a way of characterizing the spin-nematic phase diagram through non-equilibrium dynamics. Our findings show rich quantum phases stem from the competition among the Ising interaction, transverse field and non-Hermitian Gamma interaction, as well as providing a scheme for generating spin-nematic order in the spin chain.

AI.tldr: 研究非厄米Gamma相互作用对横场伊辛链相变和磁关联的影响，发现除了有能隙的铁磁和顺磁相外，还存在无能隙相，其中系统由于宇称-时间对称性破缺而表现出长程自旋向列序。
AI.motivation: 探索非厄米Gamma相互作用在横场伊辛链中如何影响量子相变和磁关联，特别是研究宇称-时间对称性破缺如何诱导新的量子相。
AI.method: 通过理论分析非厄米横场伊辛链模型，研究Ising相互作用、横场和非厄米Gamma相互作用之间的竞争，分析宇称-时间对称性破缺对系统相图和动力学行为的影响。
AI.result: 发现系统存在三个相：有能隙的铁磁相、有能隙的顺磁相和无能隙的自旋向列相。宇称-时间对称性破缺诱导了长程自旋向列序，并导致动力学自旋向列序的出现，为通过非平衡动力学表征自旋向列相图提供了方法。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米Gamma相互作用与Ising相互作用和横场的竞争产生了丰富的量子相，包括自旋向列相，这为在自旋链中生成自旋向列序提供了一种方案。

title: Magnetotransport and Phase competition in three-dimensional Hubbard-Holstein model at half-filling
summary: We investigate the magnetotransport properties of the one-band Hubbard-Holstein model at half-filling in three dimensions (3D) using exact diagonalization based semi-classical Monte Carlo simulations with phonons treated in the adiabatic limit. The low-temperature electronic correlation $U$ vs electron-phonon coupling $V$ phase diagram reveals two insulating phases--antiferromagnetic (AF-I) and charge-ordered (CO-I)--separated by a first-order transition, with no metallic phase observed at their intersection, indicating robustness of these phases in 3D. For $U \sim bandwidth$, the $V$ vs temperature $T$ phase diagram exhibits multiple phases including AF-I, CO-I, Mott-Hubbard insulator, bipolaronic insulator, and two bipolaronic metallic states. Several first-order transitions occur near $V \sim 3.75$. Above the ordering temperature, the density of states shows universal behavior dominated by electronic contribution, while susceptibility and DOS analyses reveal pseudogap features. Magnetic and transport properties along the phase boundary highlight strong proximity effects between competing phases, suggesting routes for tuning correlated materials and emergent electronic states.

AI.tldr: 使用半经典蒙特卡洛模拟研究三维单带Hubbard-Holstein模型在低温下的磁输运性质，揭示了多种绝缘相和双极化子金属态，发现相边界处存在强邻近效应。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Hubbard-Holstein模型在电子关联和电子-声子耦合共同作用下的相图，探索强关联材料中竞争相之间的相互作用和调控机制。
AI.method: 采用基于精确对角化的半经典蒙特卡洛模拟方法，在绝热极限下处理声子，研究三维单带Hubbard-Holstein模型在半填充条件下的磁输运性质。
AI.result: 低温相图显示反铁磁绝缘相和电荷有序绝缘相被一级相变分隔，没有金属相；在U~带宽时，V-T相图呈现多种相态，包括双极化子金属态；相边界处存在强邻近效应。
AI.conclusion: 三维Hubbard-Holstein模型表现出丰富的相行为，相边界处的强邻近效应为调控关联材料和设计新型电子态提供了途径。

title: G-type antiferromagnetic structure in Rb1-xV2Te2O
summary: Altermagnetism, known for its non-relativistic spin-split band structures with yet compensated moments, is being intensively investigated. Discovering new altermagnetic materials with characteristics suitable for practical use remains an important ongoing task. Recently a metallic room-temperature altermagnet candidate Rb1-xV2Te2O with a layered structure and d-wave spin symmetry has been reported based on experimental results from the spin-resolved photoemission spectroscopy and scanning tunnelling microscopy/spectroscopy (STM/STS) measurements. Here we report neutron powder diffraction (NPD) investigations on the magnetic structure of Rb1-xV2Te2O, which shows a G-type antiferromagnetic structure below the transition temperature of 337 K. The result is different from the original theoretical expectation, which might lead to new insights on the physics of this altermagnet candidate.

AI.tldr: 通过中子粉末衍射研究Rb1-xV2Te2O的磁性结构，发现其在337K以下呈现G型反铁磁结构，与理论预期不同，为这种候选交替磁体提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 交替磁体因其非相对论性自旋分裂能带结构而备受关注，但寻找具有实用特性的新材料仍是重要任务。Rb1-xV2Te2O作为金属性室温交替磁体候选材料已被报道，但其磁性结构需要进一步验证。
AI.method: 使用中子粉末衍射技术研究Rb1-xV2Te2O的磁性结构，分析其在相变温度以下的磁有序排列。
AI.result: 研究发现Rb1-xV2Te2O在337K以下呈现G型反铁磁结构，这与原始理论预期不同，可能为理解该交替磁体候选材料的物理特性提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 中子粉末衍射揭示了Rb1-xV2Te2O的G型反铁磁结构，这一发现与先前理论预测存在差异，可能推动对交替磁体物理机制的新认识。

title: Propagation, generation, and utilization of topologically trivial magnetic solitons in magnetic nanowires
summary: Magnetic solitons are nonlinear, local excitations in magnetic systems. In this study, we theoretically and numerically investigate the properties and generation of one-dimensional (1D) topologically trivial magnetic solitons in ferromagnetic nanowires. An approximate analytical soliton solution described by two free parameters is validated by comparing with the micromagnetic simulation. Across an interface between two media of different anisotropy, the reflection and refraction of a soliton are highly nonlinear that are different from the linear spin waves. A pair of magnetic solitons that propagate in opposite directions can be generated by alternately applying magnetic field or spin-polarized current pulses of opposite directions to at least two successive regions. Each soliton falls into a soliton solution that can be controlled by the generation process. These magnetic solitons can be used to drive domain wall motion over a certain distance determined by the soliton magnitude, allowing for discrete manipulation of domain walls compatible with the digital nature of information technology. Our findings pave the way for the application of topologically trivial solitons in spintronics.

AI.tldr: 研究一维拓扑平凡磁孤子在铁磁纳米线中的性质与生成，通过理论和数值方法验证解析解，探索其在界面处的非线性反射折射行为，并提出利用交替磁场或自旋极化电流脉冲生成可控孤子对的方法，用于驱动畴壁运动实现数字信息处理。
AI.motivation: 磁孤子作为磁性系统中的非线性局域激发，在自旋电子学中具有应用潜力。本研究旨在探索拓扑平凡磁孤子的性质、生成方法及其在畴壁操纵中的应用，为数字信息技术提供兼容的离散操控手段。
AI.method: 采用理论分析和微磁模拟相结合的方法：1）推导描述一维磁孤子的近似解析解（含两个自由参数）；2）通过微磁模拟验证解析解的正确性；3）研究孤子在异质界面处的反射折射行为；4）提出通过交替施加磁场或自旋极化电流脉冲在至少两个连续区域生成反向传播孤子对的方法。
AI.result: 1）验证了包含两个自由参数的近似解析孤子解；2）发现孤子在异质界面处的反射折射行为与线性自旋波显著不同，呈现高度非线性特征；3）成功生成可控制的孤子对，每个孤子都符合孤子解且可通过生成过程调控；4）证明磁孤子可用于驱动畴壁运动，移动距离由孤子幅度决定，实现与数字信息技术兼容的离散畴壁操纵。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为拓扑平凡磁孤子在自旋电子学中的应用开辟了新途径，展示了通过可控方式生成磁孤子对并利用其驱动畴壁运动的可行性，为数字信息处理提供了潜在的磁性器件实现方案。

title: Bose metal near pair-density-wave order in a spin-orbit-coupled Kondo lattice
summary: We show that a three-dimensional superconductor with a non-Abelian SU(2) order parameter can support an extended resistive regime a Bose metal, in which transport is carried by bosonic electron-Majorana bound states - separating a uniform superconductor from a pair-density-wave (PDW) phase. The setting is a solvable Kondo lattice model introduced previously by the present authors, in which Kondo screening of a Yao-Lee $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spin liquid generates an order parameter with SU(2), rather than conventional U(1), symmetry, containing both superconducting and spin-density-wave components. Two effects cooperate to make fluctuations anomalously strong in three dimensions: the vanishing of the quadratic superconducting stiffness near the Lifshitz point where the optimal pairing momentum shifts from zero to finite $Q$, and the enlarged SU(2) order-parameter manifold. Building on our prior result that doping away from half-filling drives amplitude-modulated PDW order via finite-momentum electron-Majorana condensation, we analyze the fluctuation-dominated regime above that phase using a nonlinear sigma model. We find that the order-parameter propagator develops a ring of soft modes throughout the disordered phase, and that the resulting resistivity scales approximately as $R \sim T^3$ in three dimensions.

AI.tldr: 三维超导体中具有非阿贝尔SU(2)序参量的系统在超导和配对密度波相之间展现出扩展的电阻态（玻色金属），由玻色性电子-Majorana束缚态输运。
AI.motivation: 研究三维超导体中非阿贝尔SU(2)序参量系统的特殊输运行为，探索在超导相和配对密度波相之间的中间态物理。
AI.method: 使用作者先前提出的可解Kondo晶格模型，其中Yao-Lee Z2自旋液体的Kondo屏蔽产生SU(2)对称序参量。通过非线性sigma模型分析涨落主导区域，研究序参量传播子的软模行为。
AI.result: 发现无序相中序参量传播子形成软模环，三维情况下电阻率近似按R∼T^3标度变化，系统表现出扩展的玻色金属态。
AI.conclusion: 三维SU(2)超导体在超导和配对密度波相之间存在由强涨落主导的扩展电阻区域，输运由玻色性电子-Majorana束缚态承载，电阻率具有T^3标度行为。

title: Modern Solid Electrolytes for All-Solid-State Batteries: Materials Chemistry, Structure, and Transport
comment: 46 pages, 6 figures reviews on solid electrolytes in amorphous and crystal forms
summary: In this review, from crystallographic symmetry to amorphous local polyhedra arrangement and combinations, we examine inorganic solid state electrolytes through the lens of structure property relationships, with oxides, sulfides, and halides representing three major framework chemistries. Halide solid electrolytes and their derivatives, including mixed anion halides and antiperovskite related materials, have expanded this landscape further by introducing new ways to regulate local coordination chemistry, defect populations, and transport active frameworks. Across these families, fast ion conduction depends not simply on composition or crystallographic diffusion pathways, but on the coupled effects of framework topology, site energy distribution, defect chemistry, bottleneck response, and local anion flexibility. Oxides illustrate transport within chemically robust but geometrically constrained frameworks. Sulfides demonstrate that a soft, easily polarizable lattice can broaden the array of low energy migration pathways. Halides occupy an intermediate state, in which the closely packed anion sublattices, an approximately degenerate lithium environment, and mixed anion coordination enable effective transport while simultaneously enhancing oxidation stability and compatibility with cathodes. Building on these comparisons, we argue that long range ion transport is increasingly understood not as motion along a single idealized pathway, but as the macroscopic outcome of statistically connected low barrier local migration events distributed across the structure. We further discuss the experimental and computational approaches required to establish such multiscale structure property relationships and outline future strategies for designing transport active frameworks in which conductivity, stability, and processability are optimized together.

AI.tldr: 该综述从结构-性能关系角度分析无机固态电解质，比较氧化物、硫化物和卤化物三类主要框架化学，强调离子传导取决于框架拓扑、缺陷化学、瓶颈响应等多尺度因素的耦合效应。
AI.motivation: 理解不同化学体系固态电解质（氧化物、硫化物、卤化物）的结构-性能关系，揭示离子传导的微观机制，为设计兼具高导电性、稳定性和可加工性的固态电解质提供理论基础。
AI.method: 通过比较分析三种主要框架化学（氧化物、硫化物、卤化物）的晶体对称性、局部多面体排列、缺陷化学、瓶颈响应等结构特征，结合实验和计算手段建立多尺度结构-性能关系。
AI.result: 氧化物在化学稳定但几何受限的框架中实现离子传导；硫化物通过软晶格拓宽低能迁移路径；卤化物处于中间状态，通过紧密堆积的阴离子亚晶格和混合阴离子配位实现有效传导，同时增强氧化稳定性和阴极兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 长程离子传导应理解为统计连接的局部低能垒迁移事件的宏观结果，而非沿单一理想路径的运动。未来需要优化导电性、稳定性和可加工性的协同设计策略，建立多尺度结构-性能关系的研究方法。

title: Generic skyrmion phase diagram in ferrimagnetic films
summary: Ferrimagnetic skyrmions offer enhanced tunability due to antiferromagnetically coupled sublattices and reduced net magnetization. In chiral magnetic films at zero magnetic field, skyrmion stability is commonly characterized by a dimensionless parameter $κ$, yet its applicability to ferrimagnetic systems remains unclear, as most studies assume a fixed, strong inter-sublattice exchange coupling $J$. Here we investigate how variations in $J$ govern relaxed stable and metastable ferrimagnetic skyrmion configurations and introduce a dimensionless parameter $ζ_{eff}$ to characterize the crossover between strong and weak inter-sublattice locking. In the strong-coupling regime, inter-sublattice locking enables stabilization of skyrmion in a sublattice where intrinsic Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction is absent while the other sublattice has finite DMI, yielding a sublattice with DMI-free ferrimagnetic skyrmions. As $J$ decreases, this locking breaks down, leading to independent sublattice behavior and the failure of an effective $κ$-based description. Our results establish a unified framework linking inter-sublattice exchange and skyrmion phase stability in ferrimagnetic systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了铁磁斯格明子在亚晶格间交换耦合变化下的稳定性，提出了描述强/弱耦合交叉的参数ζ_eff，揭示了在强耦合下可实现无DMI亚晶格的斯格明子稳定化。
AI.motivation: 铁磁斯格明子因其反铁磁耦合亚晶格和降低的净磁化而具有增强的可调性，但现有描述斯格明子稳定性的参数κ在铁磁系统中的适用性尚不明确，特别是当亚晶格间交换耦合J变化时。
AI.method: 研究通过改变亚晶格间交换耦合J来探索铁磁斯格明子的稳定和亚稳态构型，引入无量纲参数ζ_eff来表征强/弱亚晶格锁定的交叉行为，分析不同耦合强度下的斯格明子稳定性。
AI.result: 在强耦合区，亚晶格锁定使一个无DMI的亚晶格也能稳定斯格明子；当J减小时，锁定失效，亚晶格行为独立，基于有效κ的描述不再适用。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了连接亚晶格间交换耦合与铁磁系统斯格明子相稳定性的统一框架，为理解铁磁斯格明子的稳定性机制提供了新见解。

title: Fingerprints of preformed pairs in two-electron angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Supplementary Material available upon request from berciu@phas.ubc.ca
summary: We use variational exact diagonalization (VED) to calculate the two-electron removal spectral weight for the Hubbard-Holstein model, starting from the ground-state with two electrons on a one-dimensional chain. We argue that this spectral weight provides a valuable proxy for the intensity of 2eARPES processes. Our results show that when contrasted to the presumably larger signal due to two electrons ejected from two different pairs, the presumably weaker signal due to two electrons ejected from the same pair (i) is segregated in energy, appearing at a lower binding energy, and (ii) has a very characteristic momentum dependence, with a different symmetry than that of the signal corresponding to two electrons emitted from two different pairs. We verify that these fingerprints appear for pairs with different symmetries, and prove that they arise as a direct consequence of momentum and energy conservation, therefore they are generic for any model with electron-boson coupling that can lead to formation of electron pairs. Experimental observation of these fingerprints will confirm the existence of pairs. Moreover, the momentum dependence map allows one to distinguish whether the pairs are coherent (superconducting) or not. Finally, we argue that these considerations generalize to finite but low electron concentrations, finite temperatures and higher dimensions.

AI.tldr: 使用变分精确对角化方法研究Hubbard-Holstein模型中双电子移除谱权重，为2eARPES实验提供理论预测，揭示配对电子的特征能量和动量指纹
AI.motivation: 研究双电子角分辨光电子能谱(2eARPES)中配对电子的特征信号，为实验上确认电子配对的存在提供理论依据和可观测的物理指纹
AI.method: 采用变分精确对角化(VED)方法计算Hubbard-Holstein模型的双电子移除谱权重，分析一维链上双电子基态的谱特征
AI.result: 发现来自同一电子对的双电子信号具有两个关键特征：(1)在能量上分离，出现在较低结合能处；(2)具有独特的动量依赖性和对称性，与来自不同电子对的信号明显不同。这些特征对不同的配对对称性都适用
AI.conclusion: 这些特征源于动量和能量守恒，是电子-玻色子耦合导致电子配对的普适特征。实验观测这些指纹可确认配对存在，动量依赖图还能区分配对是否相干(超导)。结果可推广到有限浓度、有限温度和更高维度

title: Photoinduced orbital polarization and Jahn-Teller effect in RNiO$_3$
summary: The orbital degree of freedom in rare-earth nickelates is typically inactive across the temperature-driven metal-insulator transition, where the system develops two inequivalent Ni sites associated with Ni-O bond disproportionation and breathing-mode distortions of NiO$_6$ octahedra. Here, we show that orbital polarization can be induced by optical excitation with linearly polarized light. Using an interacting multiband tight-binding model combined with real-time simulations of coupled electron-ion-spin dynamics, we find that photoinduced $d$-$d$ transitions reduce the local magnetic moments at Ni sites and effectively suppress Hund's coupling $J$ in the excited state. Importantly, these transitions can be made strongly orbital-selective by tuning the light polarization, leading to an imbalance in $e_g$ orbital occupancies. The resulting nonequilibrium state, characterized by reduced effective $J$ and unequal orbital populations, becomes unstable toward Jahn-Teller (JT) distortions, driving structural relaxation along coherently excited JT modes. Our results demonstrate that polarization-controlled optical excitation provides a pathway to access hidden nonthermal phases with emergent orbital order, enabling coherent control of coupled charge, spin, and lattice degrees of freedom on ultrafast timescales.

AI.tldr: 通过线性偏振光激发可诱导轨道极化，实现轨道选择性光激发，驱动Jahn-Teller畸变，从而控制电荷、自旋和晶格自由度
AI.motivation: 稀土镍酸盐中的轨道自由度通常在金属-绝缘体转变中不活跃，但光学激发可能诱导轨道极化，从而探索隐藏的非热相并实现多自由度的相干控制
AI.method: 使用相互作用多带紧束缚模型结合电子-离子-自旋动力学的实时模拟，研究线性偏振光诱导的d-d跃迁及其对轨道占据的影响
AI.result: 光激发可降低Ni位点的局域磁矩，有效抑制激发态中的Hund耦合J，通过偏振调谐实现轨道选择性激发，导致eg轨道占据不平衡，驱动Jahn-Teller畸变
AI.conclusion: 偏振控制的光激发为访问具有涌现轨道序的隐藏非热相提供了途径，能够在超快时间尺度上相干控制耦合的电荷、自旋和晶格自由度

title: Designer metal-free altermagnetism in honeycomb two-dimensional frameworks
summary: Altermagnetism combines momentum-dependent spin splitting of opposite-spin channels with zero net magnetization, enabling electric-field control of spin transport that is robust against external magnetic fields. Although widely explored in inorganic systems, metal-free altermagnets with pi-spin splitting, particularly in two-dimensional organic frameworks, have remained elusive. Here, we introduce a molecular design strategy that achieves designer metal-free altermagnetism in honeycomb 2D crystals. By reducing the monomer point-group symmetry from D3h to C2v in triangulene-derived radicals, inversion symmetry is selectively broken while the bipartite lattice is preserved. Spin-polarized density-functional-theory calculations reveal strong antiferromagnetic couplings of -130 meV, d-wave spin splitting of 17 meV at the M point, and Mott-Hubbard gaps of 1.26 eV, all fully consistent with Lieb's theorem. A minimal tight-binding model shows that anisotropic nearest-neighbor hopping arising from direction-dependent pi-orbital overlap is the microscopic origin of spin splitting and altermagnetism. Biaxial compressive strain further enhances the spin splitting to 27 meV. These results establish a general approach to room-temperature organic altermagnets and open a pathway toward carbon-based altermagnetism via engineered inversion-symmetry breaking.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分子设计策略，在二维有机晶体中实现金属自由的反铁磁体，通过降低单体对称性选择性破坏反演对称性，同时保持双分格点结构，实现d波自旋分裂和强反铁磁耦合。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体具有动量依赖的自旋分裂和零净磁化特性，可实现电场控制的自旋输运且对外磁场鲁棒。然而，具有π自旋分裂的金属自由反铁磁体，特别是在二维有机框架中，一直难以实现。
AI.method: 通过将三角烯衍生物自由基的单体点群对称性从D3h降低到C2v，选择性破坏反演对称性同时保持双分格点结构。使用自旋极化密度泛函理论计算，并构建最小紧束缚模型分析微观机制。
AI.result: 计算显示强反铁磁耦合（-130 meV）、M点处17 meV的d波自旋分裂、1.26 eV的Mott-Hubbard带隙，均符合Lieb定理。各向异性最近邻跳跃是自旋分裂和反铁磁性的微观起源，双轴压缩应变可将自旋分裂增强至27 meV。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种实现室温有机反铁磁体的通用方法，通过工程化反演对称性破坏开辟了碳基反铁磁体的新途径。

title: Asymmetric Scattering-Induced Neel Spin-Orbit Torque in Antiferromagnets
summary: Magnetic switching in antiferromagnets relies on Neel spin orbit torque (NSOT), which originates from a current-induced staggered spin polarization of itinerant electrons. In collinear antiferromagnets, such a response requires the spin susceptibility to be odd under combined space-time inversion symmetry (PT), and is conventionally attributed to symmetric scattering processes. Here, we demonstrate that asymmetric impurity scattering generates an additional PT-odd spin polarization when coupled with the anomalous spin polarizability (ASP) of Bloch electrons. This extrinsic contribution arises from the interplay between antisymmetric higher-order scattering processes and band geometry, effectively converting an otherwise PT-even susceptibility into a staggered spin polarization. Using a minimal model of tetragonal CuMnAs, we show that this anomalous skew-scattering contribution can be comparable to, and with sufficient impurity density even exceed, the conventional symmetric scattering (Drude) contribution. Our results identify a new band-geometry-driven mechanism for NSOT and establish an efficient route for electrical control of antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 论文发现了一种新的外禀机制，通过非对称杂质散射和布洛赫电子的反常自旋极化率产生PT-奇的自旋极化，为反铁磁体的电控提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为反铁磁体中的NSOT主要来自对称散射过程，但本文旨在探索非对称杂质散射如何通过能带几何效应产生额外的PT-奇自旋极化，从而增强反铁磁体的电控效率。
AI.method: 使用四方CuMnAs作为最小模型，结合反常自旋极化率（ASP）和能带几何效应，分析非对称高阶散射过程如何将PT-偶的磁化率转化为交变自旋极化。
AI.result: 发现反常斜散射贡献可以与传统的对称散射（Drude）贡献相当，在足够杂质密度下甚至超过传统贡献，为NSOT提供了新的能带几何驱动机制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了一种新的外禀机制，通过非对称散射和能带几何效应产生PT-奇自旋极化，为反铁磁体的高效电控开辟了新途径。

title: Localized Exciton Emission with Spontaneous Circular Polarization in NiPS3/WSe2 Heterostructures
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures (HSs) provide a versatile platform for tailoring electronic, optical, and magnetic properties via proximity effects at their interfaces. In this work, we explore the optical response of few-layer NiPS3/WSe2 HSs using low-temperature micro-photoluminescence (μ-PL) and magneto-PL spectroscopy. The HSs exhibit multiple sharp excitonic peaks that do not appear in the individual constituent materials, indicating the emergence of localized intralayer WSe2 excitons confined by interface-induced potentials. Notably, these excitons exhibit spontaneous circular polarization even in the absence of an external magnetic field, suggesting a magnetic proximity effect induced by uncompensated spins at the NiPS3 interface. Magneto-PL measurements further reveal nonlinear Zeeman splitting, consistent with the presence of an interfacial exchange field that alters the valley exciton dynamics. Density functional theory (DFT) calculations confirm the intralayer origin of the PL and reveal interfacial hybridization and spin texture modifications, supporting the experimental findings. These results highlight how combining a 2D semiconductor with a layered antiferromagnet enables control over valley polarization and spin degrees of freedom, offering new opportunities for chiral light sources and magnetically tunable optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 二维NiPS3/WSe2范德华异质结中观察到界面诱导的局域激子，在无外磁场下自发圆偏振，表明磁性邻近效应调控谷激子动力学。
AI.motivation: 探索二维范德华异质结中通过界面邻近效应调控电子、光学和磁学性质的可能性，特别是结合二维半导体与层状反铁磁体实现谷极化和自旋自由度的控制。
AI.method: 采用低温微区光致发光和磁光致发光光谱研究NiPS3/WSe2异质结，结合密度泛函理论计算分析界面电子结构和自旋纹理。
AI.result: 异质结中出现组分材料中不存在的尖锐激子峰，表明界面诱导势场局域化激子；无外磁场下观察到自发圆偏振，证实磁性邻近效应；磁光测量显示非线性塞曼分裂，表明界面交换场改变谷激子动力学。
AI.conclusion: 二维半导体与层状反铁磁体结合可实现谷极化和自旋自由度的有效控制，为手性光源和磁可调光电器件提供新机遇。

title: Magnetism and symmetry of superconducting gap in LaFeAsO from dynamical mean-field theory
summary: By employing a combined method of density functional theory and dynamical mean field theory (DFT+DMFT) we investigate the effect of electronic correlations on the magnetic and superconducting properties of the iron-based parent compound LaFeAsO. We find that the static non-local susceptibility $χ({\bf q})$ exhibits a peak at the in-plane wave vector ${\mathbf Q}=(π,π)$, which is strongly enhanced upon inclusion of the vertex corrections in the ladder approximation, leading to magnetic instability. Considering the eigenfunctions of the Bethe-Salpeter equation with the vertex, obtained within the second order perturbation theory, as well as the ladder approach containing dynamic interaction vertices, in agreement with earlier weak-coupling-based studies of LaFeAsO, we obtain a close competition between $d$-wave and $s_{\pm}$ order parameters, dominating in the second-order and ladder approach, respectively. We argue that the dominating $s_{\pm}$ instability in the ladder DFT+DMFT approach is related to the reduced degree of magnetic frustration by itinerant degrees of freedom due to only partially formed local magnetic moments. Our study shows that dynamic correlation effects do not change the type of the leading superconducting instability in LaFeAsO.

AI.tldr: 使用DFT+DMFT方法研究LaFeAsO中电子关联对磁性和超导性质的影响，发现顶点修正增强磁不稳定性，s±和d波序参数竞争，动态关联不改变主导超导不稳定性类型。
AI.motivation: 研究电子关联效应对铁基超导母体化合物LaFeAsO的磁性和超导性质的影响，特别是理解磁不稳定性与超导序参数之间的竞争关系。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论相结合的方法（DFT+DMFT），使用梯子近似包含顶点修正，通过Bethe-Salpeter方程分析磁不稳定性。
AI.result: 静态非局域磁化率在波矢Q=(π,π)处出现峰值，顶点修正显著增强磁不稳定性；s±和d波序参数存在激烈竞争，梯子DFT+DMFT方法中s±占主导，这与部分形成的局域磁矩减少磁阻挫有关。
AI.conclusion: 动态关联效应不改变LaFeAsO中主导超导不稳定性的类型，s±波序参数在包含顶点修正的梯子近似中保持主导地位。

title: Crystallographic Challenges in Microscopy of Multidomain Spinel Materials
summary: Electron microscopy techniques are instrumental in the characterization of energy storage materials, with atomic resolution images providing the detailed structural features that are needed to understand their properties. Atomically resolved electron microscopy techniques have been routinely used to study the microstructure in high performing Mn-based oxide cathodes, which often contain spinel-like ordering. Here, we evaluate STEM-HAADF imaging and subsequent Fourier filtering as tools for characterizing δ-DRX spinel domains and their antiphase boundaries, which play a central role in the material's electrochemical performance. Using electron microscopy simulations and recent theoretical insight into the structural makeup of δ-DRX, we attempt to characterize the crystallographic spinel variants which occur in its multi-domain structure. We show that each domain interface, arising from pairings among eight distinct variants, can be categorized into one of four Fourier filtered profiles, one of which leaves the boundary undetectable in atomically resolved electron microscopy when viewed along the preferred [110] zone axis. Our results also suggest that the appearance of seemingly disordered or layered-like regions might actually arise from low energy domain boundaries which are slanted relative to the [110] viewing direction. Our findings highlight the need for careful interpretation of atomic-resolution micrographs of phase transitions, where local reordering drives transformations from higher to lower symmetry structures while maintaining lattice coherence.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了STEM-HAADF成像和傅里叶滤波在表征δ-DRX尖晶石域及其反相边界中的应用，揭示了不同晶格变体界面的分类特征，并指出某些边界在特定观察方向下不可检测。
AI.motivation: 原子分辨率电子显微镜技术已广泛应用于研究高性能锰基氧化物阴极的微观结构，这些材料通常含有尖晶石类有序结构。然而，对于δ-DRX尖晶石域及其反相边界的准确表征仍存在挑战，这些边界对材料的电化学性能至关重要。
AI.method: 采用STEM-HAADF成像和傅里叶滤波技术，结合电子显微镜模拟和δ-DRX结构的最新理论认识，对多域结构中出现的结晶学尖晶石变体进行表征。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）八个不同变体配对形成的每个域界面可分为四种傅里叶滤波特征类型之一；2）其中一种类型在沿[110]晶带轴观察时，边界在原子分辨率电子显微镜中不可检测；3）看似无序或层状的区域可能源于相对于[110]观察方向倾斜的低能域边界。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在相变过程中需要谨慎解释原子分辨率显微图像，因为局部重排驱动从高对称性到低对称性结构的转变，同时保持晶格相干性。这些发现对准确表征能量存储材料的结构特征具有重要意义。

title: pyzentropy: A Python package implementing recursive entropy for first-principles thermodynamics
summary: While the recursive property of entropy is well known in information theory, it is rarely utilized in thermodynamics, despite entropy originating in this field. Moreover, computational tools to implement this concept within first-principles thermodynamics remain lacking. In this work, we introduce an open-source Python package, pyzentropy, to implement this approach. We demonstrate its effectiveness using $Fe_3Pt$ as a case study, considering a 12-atom supercell with multiple magnetic configurations. By applying the recursive formulation of entropy to compute the total entropy of the system, we reproduce the Invar behavior, along with the anomalous temperature dependence of the linear coefficient of thermal expansion (LCTE), heat capacity $C_P$, and bulk modulus $B$. We also construct the $T$-$V$ and $P$-$T$ phase diagrams in good agreement with experimental observations. Finally, we highlight the importance of determining key high-probability configurations to accurately capture material properties.

AI.tldr: 开发了pyzentropy Python包，利用熵的递归性质进行第一性原理热力学计算，以Fe3Pt为例验证了方法有效性
AI.motivation: 尽管熵的递归性质在信息论中广为人知，但在热力学中很少被利用，且缺乏在第一性原理热力学中实现这一概念的计算工具
AI.method: 开发了开源Python包pyzentropy，实现熵的递归公式化方法，应用于Fe3Pt的12原子超胞多磁构型研究
AI.result: 成功复现了Invar行为、热膨胀系数异常温度依赖性、热容Cp、体模量B，构建了与实验观测一致的T-V和P-T相图
AI.conclusion: 确定关键高概率构型对于准确捕捉材料性质至关重要，pyzentropy包为第一性原理热力学计算提供了有效工具

authors: Cesar Javier Lockhart de la Rosa
title: Seed Layer Engineering for Effective Charge Transfer Doping of MoS$_2$ Transistors
summary: Integrating two-dimensional semiconductors such as MoS$_2$ with dielectric materials remains a central challenge for their use in future logic technologies. While seed layers are typically introduced to promote dielectric nucleation and adhesion, we show that they also critically govern charge-transfer doping and, in turn, transistor performance. Back-gated monolayer MoS$_2$ transistors passivated on their top-surface with a Ta-seed/HfO$_x$ dielectric stack were fabricated and characterized electrically and physically using Raman, photoluminescence, and X-ray photoelectron spectroscopies. Threshold voltage and on-current varied strongly with Ta-seed thickness and deposition conditions, and these changes correlated with signatures observed across all spectroscopic probes. The results reveal that the seed layer both introduces disorder into the MoS$_2$ channel and modifies the interfacial charge environment controlling charge transfer between HfO$_x$ and MoS$_2$. Optical spectroscopy shows that on-current tracks seed-induced disorder, whereas X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy indicates that threshold voltage correlates with shifts in the local electrostatic environment associated with interfacial charge transfer. Better performance was obtained with ultrathin 0.2 nm Ta seed layers deposited under oxygen-poor conditions, which limit deposition-induced damage while facilitating charge transfer. These findings identify seed-layer engineering as a key strategy for controlling disorder and interfacial doping in MoS$_2$ devices and establish multimodal spectroscopy as a practical during-fabrication approach for process development and monitoring.

AI.tldr: 研究显示，用于促进介电层成核和附着的种子层（如Ta）不仅影响MoS₂晶体管的介电层质量，还通过引入无序和调控界面电荷转移，显著影响器件性能参数如阈值电压和导通电流。
AI.motivation: 二维半导体（如MoS₂）与介电材料的集成是未来逻辑技术的关键挑战。虽然通常引入种子层来促进介电层成核和附着，但其对电荷转移掺杂和晶体管性能的影响尚不清楚，需要系统研究。
AI.method: 制备了背栅单层MoS₂晶体管，顶部采用Ta种子层/HfOₓ介电堆叠进行钝化。通过电学表征结合拉曼、光致发光和X射线光电子能谱等多模态光谱技术，分析不同Ta种子层厚度和沉积条件对器件性能的影响。
AI.result: 阈值电压和导通电流随Ta种子层厚度和沉积条件显著变化。光谱分析表明：种子层既向MoS₂沟道引入无序，又调控HfOₓ与MoS₂之间的界面电荷转移。导通电流与种子诱导的无序相关，而阈值电压与界面电荷转移引起的局部静电环境变化相关。在贫氧条件下沉积的超薄0.2 nm Ta种子层表现出最佳性能，既能限制沉积损伤，又能促进电荷转移。
AI.conclusion: 种子层工程是调控MoS₂器件无序和界面掺杂的关键策略。多模态光谱技术可作为制造过程中的实用方法，用于工艺开发和监控，为二维半导体与介电材料集成提供重要指导。

title: Three-dimensional visualization of lattice defects in $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ via synchrotron-radiation Borrmann-effect X-ray topo-tomography
summary: beta-Ga2O3 is a promising material for next-generation power electronics; however, its performance is strongly affected by lattice defects such as dislocations. In this study, we demonstrate three-dimensional (3D) visualization of dislocations in \b{eta}-Ga2O3 using synchrotron-radiation X-ray topo-tomography under a two-beam Borrmann-effect condition in transmission X-ray topography. By rotating the sample about the diffraction vector and acquiring a series of topo-tomographic images at different rotation angles, the evolution of dislocation contrast is captured, providing intuitive, depth-resolved visualization of dislocations. This method enables clear separation of dislocations in the epilayer and substrate in Schottky barrier diode structures, offering insight into dislocation propagation and their impact on epitaxial growth and device performance. This study represents the first demonstration of 3D dislocation reconstruction in beta-Ga2O3.

AI.tldr: 首次利用同步辐射X射线拓扑层析技术实现β-Ga2O3中位错的三维可视化，能够清晰区分外延层和衬底中的位错分布。
AI.motivation: β-Ga2O3是下一代功率电子器件的有前途材料，但其性能受位错等晶格缺陷的强烈影响，需要开发能够三维可视化位错分布的方法来研究其对器件性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用同步辐射X射线拓扑层析技术，在透射X射线形貌学的双光束Borrmann效应条件下，通过绕衍射矢量旋转样品并获取不同旋转角度下的拓扑层析图像序列，捕捉位错对比度的演变。
AI.result: 实现了β-Ga2O3中位错的三维重建，能够直观、深度分辨地可视化位错，清晰分离肖特基势垒二极管结构中外延层和衬底的位错，为研究位错传播及其对外延生长和器件性能的影响提供了新见解。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次在β-Ga2O3中实现位错的三维重建，该方法为研究晶格缺陷对材料性能和器件特性的影响提供了强大的分析工具。

title: Type-II-like ultrafast demagnetization behavior in NiCo2O4 thin films
summary: Rare-earth-ferrimagnetic oxides are emerging as attractive platforms for investigating ultrafast spin dynamics. Here, we study the photoinduced magnetization dynamics of epitaxial NiCo2O4 (NCO) thin films by time-resolved magneto-optical Faraday effect using two independent pump-probe configurations: 1030/515 nm and 800/400 nm. In both measurements, photoexcitation induces an immediate reduction of the magneto-optical signal within the experimental time resolution, followed by a reproducible slower demagnetization component with a characteristic timescale of approximately 5-6 ps and a subsequent recovery on the ~100 ps timescale. Importantly, this picosecond demagnetization component is observed consistently across the two experimental configurations and excitation wavelengths, demonstrating that it is an intrinsic feature of the ultrafast magnetic response of NCO thin films. Because the earliest-time dip may contain a transient optical contribution, we describe the overall response as type-II-like, rather than assigning a definitive textbook type-II classification solely on the basis of the sub-resolution signal. These results establish a robust two-step ultrafast demagnetization behavior in NCO and highlight rare-earth-free oxide ferrimagnets as promising systems for exploring Mult sublattice spin dynamics on ultrafast timescales.

AI.tldr: NCO薄膜超快退磁研究：双泵浦配置揭示固有两步退磁过程（亚皮秒初始下降+~5-6ps慢速退磁），确立无稀土氧化物亚铁磁体为研究超快多亚晶格自旋动力学的有前景平台。
AI.motivation: 研究无稀土氧化物亚铁磁体（NiCo2O4）的超快自旋动力学，探索其在超快时间尺度上的多亚晶格自旋动力学特性，为开发新型自旋电子学材料提供基础。
AI.method: 使用时间分辨磁光法拉第效应，采用两种独立泵浦-探测配置（1030/515 nm和800/400 nm），测量外延NCO薄膜的光致磁化动力学。
AI.result: 光激发在实验时间分辨率内立即降低磁光信号，随后出现可重复的慢速退磁分量（特征时间尺度约5-6ps），最后在~100ps时间尺度恢复。这一皮秒退磁分量在两种实验配置和激发波长下一致观察到，表明是NCO薄膜超快磁响应的固有特征。
AI.conclusion: NCO表现出稳健的两步超快退磁行为，无稀土氧化物亚铁磁体是探索超快时间尺度多亚晶格自旋动力学的有前景系统，早期信号下降可能包含瞬态光学贡献，因此整体响应被描述为类II型而非明确教科书式II型分类。

title: SWORD: Symmetry and Wyckoff-sequence of Ordered and Disordered crystals
summary: Novelty in materials discovery requires candidates to be distinct, non-redundant, and thermodynamically plausible. While crystallographic databases continue to expand in both size and complexity, making efficient and reliable novelty assessment has become increasingly difficult. This becomes particularly acute when crystallographic disorder is involved, as partial occupancies greatly enlarge the structure-composition space and obscure the identification of genuinely distinct structures. Here, we introduce SWORD, a symmetry-aware, Wyckoff-based string representation compatible with both ordered and disordered crystals. SWORD provides (i) standardization of symmetry-equivalent structural descriptions into a consistent label, (ii) explicitly represents co-occupying species on partially occupied sites, and (iii) quantifies complex disorder through a degree of mixing descriptor that captures continuous variation in site stoichiometry. These features enable efficient structure grouping, duplicate identification, and finer refinement of disordered structures. Benchmarking against existing fingerprint and structure-matching methods shows that SWORD remains invariant under identity-preserving transformations while retaining interpretable sensitivity to structural perturbations. In addition, SWORD shows competitive performance in associating unrelaxed and intermediate configurations with their final relaxed states along relaxation trajectories. This feature could enable more reliable novelty assessment directly from partially relaxed or even unrelaxed generated structures. Finally, SWORD was used to showcase its capability of disorder-aware database-scale deduplication and curation for the Inorganic Crystal Structure Database (ICSD). The curated ICSD would serve as the basis for the materials informatics and data-driven materials design in the era of artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: SWORD是一种对称感知的Wyckoff基字符串表示方法，用于标准化有序和晶体结构，特别处理部分占据位点，实现高效的结构分组和去重。
AI.motivation: 材料发现需要识别独特、非冗余且热力学合理的候选结构。随着晶体学数据库规模和复杂度的增加，特别是当涉及晶体学无序（部分占据位点）时，高效可靠的新颖性评估变得困难，因为部分占据极大地扩大了结构-组成空间并模糊了真正独特结构的识别。
AI.method: 引入SWORD（对称感知Wyckoff基字符串表示），该方法：1）将对称等价的结构描述标准化为一致标签；2）明确表示部分占据位点上的共占据物种；3）通过混合度描述符量化复杂无序，捕捉位点化学计量的连续变化。
AI.result: SWORD在保持身份保持变换不变性的同时，对结构扰动保持可解释的敏感性。在松弛轨迹中，它能竞争性地关联未松弛和中间构型与最终松弛状态。成功应用于ICSD数据库的无序感知去重和整理。
AI.conclusion: SWORD为有序和无序晶体提供了一种有效的标准化表示方法，能够实现高效的结构分组、重复识别和无序结构细化，为材料信息学和数据驱动材料设计提供了可靠的基础数据库。

title: Multipolar Piezoelectricity and Anisotropic Surface Transport in Alterelectrics
summary: Altermagnets are an emergent class of materials combining features of ferro- and antiferro-magnetic materials. They have spin-separated bands normally associated with ferromagnets, but a vanishing net magnetization. Moreover the symmetries giving rise to $d$-wave altermagnetism can provide them with a particular anisotropic, quadrupolar (i.e. with equal and opposite values when strained in perpendicular directions) piezomagnetism. Observing that the same symmetries provide a natural place to look for hyberbolic wave dispersion, this raises the question which properties are intrinsically linked to magnetism and which are determined by the symmetry. Here, we disentangle these concepts by introducing an alternative to altermagnets, based on electric polarization. These alterelectrics display quadrupolar piezoelectricity and a hyperbolic dispersion, which we demonstrate conceptually within a simplified model as well as a first-principles material realization. We furthermore establish that a counterpart of the spin-separated bands is formed by surface modes which allow for surface dependent anisotropic electronic transport analogous to the spintronic applications proposed for altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"alterelectrics"概念，作为altermagnets的电动类比，具有四极压电性和双曲色散特性，表面模式可实现各向异性电子输运。
AI.motivation: altermagnets结合了铁磁和反铁磁特性，具有自旋分离能带但净磁化强度为零。其对称性导致四极压磁性和双曲色散，需要厘清哪些特性本质源于磁性，哪些仅由对称性决定。
AI.method: 引入基于电极化的"alterelectrics"概念，通过简化模型和第一性原理材料实现，展示其四极压电性和双曲色散特性，并建立表面模式类比自旋分离能带。
AI.result: 成功构建了alterelectrics理论框架，证明其具有四极压电性和双曲色散，表面模式可实现各向异性电子输运，类似于altermagnets的自旋电子学应用。
AI.conclusion: alterelectrics作为altermagnets的电动对应物，揭示了对称性而非磁性是导致四极性和双曲色散的关键因素，为各向异性电子输运提供了新平台。

title: A unified framework for grain boundary distributions in textured materials
summary:
Grain boundary plane distributions are widely used to infer the mechanisms governing grain boundary formation in polycrystalline materials. We show that such interpretations are inherently ambiguous. Using a unified eight-parameter boundary distribution framework, we derive both the grain boundary character distribution (GBCD) and the grain boundary normal distribution (GBND) and identify two limiting cases of boundary network formation.
  We show that in macroscopically driven networks, the crystal-frame GBND is given by a convolution of the specimen GBND with the orientation distribution function (ODF), whereas in crystallographically driven networks the specimen GBND is obtained by convolution of the crystal GBND with the ODF. This duality implies that anisotropy in the GBND may arise from macroscopic alignment effects rather than intrinsic crystallographic selection. Conversely, this relationship may be used to identify the dominant formation process in the measured mcirostructures.
  Evaluation of a wide variety of simulated microstructures confirm the theoretically predicted relationships between texture, GBND and GBCD. In particular, our examples confirm that the GBND or GBCD alone are not sufficient for identifying grain boundary formation mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 晶界平面分布用于推断多晶材料中晶界形成机制，但本文证明这种解释存在固有模糊性。通过八参数边界分布框架，揭示了晶界形成机制的双重性，指出仅凭GBND或GBCD不足以确定晶界形成机制。
AI.motivation: 晶界平面分布（GBND）和晶界特征分布（GBCD）被广泛用于推断多晶材料中晶界形成的机制。然而，目前对这些分布的解释存在模糊性，需要更系统的理论框架来澄清不同形成机制对晶界分布的影响。
AI.method: 提出统一的八参数边界分布框架，推导出GBCD和GBND之间的关系。理论分析表明存在两种极限情况：宏观驱动网络和晶体学驱动网络。通过多种模拟微结构验证理论预测的纹理、GBND和GBCD之间的关系。
AI.result: 在宏观驱动网络中，晶体框架GBND由试样GBND与取向分布函数（ODF）卷积得到；在晶体学驱动网络中，试样GBND由晶体GBND与ODF卷积得到。这种双重性意味着GBND的各向异性可能源于宏观排列效应而非内在晶体学选择。模拟结果证实了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 晶界平面分布的解释存在固有模糊性，仅凭GBND或GBCD不足以确定晶界形成机制。提出的理论框架揭示了晶界形成的双重性，为识别主导形成过程提供了新方法，对理解多晶材料微观结构演化具有重要意义。

title: Materials Informatics Across the Length Scales
summary: Materials informatics is increasingly used to support modelling, analysis and design across the length scales of materials science, from atomistic simulations to microstructural characterisation and continuum descriptions. Despite rapid progress, the reliability and transferability of these approaches vary strongly with scale. Here we survey data-driven methods at the nanoscale, mesoscale, and micro-to-continuum levels, highlighting established capabilities as well as unresolved challenges. Machine-learning interatomic potentials, mesoscale surrogate and operator-learning models, and learning-based analysis of experimental microstructures are discussed, with emphasis on data quality, uncertainty, interpretability, and cross-scale consistency. We further examine the role of data standards, ontologies, and emerging tools, such as autonomous laboratories, where they directly affect multiscale workflows. This perspective clarifies what can be considered reliable today and identifies key obstacles to the broader integration of materials informatics across scales.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了材料信息学在不同尺度（纳米、介观、微观到连续）的应用现状，评估了现有方法的可靠性，并指出了跨尺度整合面临的关键挑战。
AI.motivation: 材料信息学在不同尺度上的应用进展不一，其可靠性和可迁移性存在显著差异。需要系统评估各尺度数据驱动方法的现状，明确当前可靠的能力，并识别跨尺度整合的主要障碍。
AI.method: 采用综述性研究方法，系统调查纳米尺度、介观尺度、微观到连续尺度三个层次的数据驱动方法。重点分析机器学习原子间势、介观尺度代理模型和算子学习模型、实验微观结构的学习分析等方法。
AI.result: 明确了各尺度已建立的能力：纳米尺度的机器学习原子间势、介观尺度的代理模型、微观结构的分析工具。同时识别了数据质量、不确定性、可解释性、跨尺度一致性等未解决的挑战，以及数据标准、本体论和自主实验室等新兴工具的作用。
AI.conclusion: 材料信息学在不同尺度已取得显著进展，但跨尺度整合仍面临重大挑战。需要解决数据质量、不确定性量化、模型可解释性和跨尺度一致性等问题，同时利用数据标准、本体论和自主实验室等新兴工具推动多尺度工作流程的发展。

title: Polarization Engineering of the Orbital Hall Conductivity in Two-dimensional Ferroelectric Higher-Order Topological Insulator Tl$_2$S and SnS
summary: Ferroelectric higher-order topological insulators (HOTIs) exhibit tunable physical properties arising from the interplay between ferroelectric polarization and band topology. This work investigates the topological origin of two classes of two-dimensional (2D) ferroelectric HOTIs with out-of-plane or in-plane polarization, revealing their distinct orbital transport behaviors and the mechanism for engineering orbital Hall conductivity (OHC) via polarization control. Our results demonstrate the unique role of polarization in modulating both the higher-order band topology and orbital transport. A strong coupling between in-plane polarization and higher-order topology is identified, establishing in-plane polarization as an intrinsic means to reversibly switch the OHC plateau within the band gap. Using Tl$_2$S and SnS as representative models of the two HOTI types, we demonstrate persistent and electrically switchable orbital transport, respectively. Our study advances the understanding of the coupling among ferroelectricity, higher-order topology, and orbital transport, offering new avenues for controllable orbitronics.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体中极化方向对轨道霍尔电导的调控机制，发现面内极化可作为可逆开关控制带隙内的轨道输运平台。
AI.motivation: 研究铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体中铁电极化、高阶拓扑和轨道输运之间的耦合机制，探索通过极化控制实现可调控轨道电子学的新途径。
AI.method: 通过理论分析两类具有面外或面内极化的二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体，研究其拓扑起源和轨道输运行为，以Tl₂S和SnS作为两类模型的代表进行具体计算。
AI.result: 发现面内极化与高阶拓扑之间存在强耦合，面内极化可作为本征手段可逆地开关带隙内的轨道霍尔电导平台，分别展示了Tl₂S的持久性轨道输运和SnS的电可切换轨道输运。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对铁电性、高阶拓扑和轨道输运之间耦合机制的理解，为可控轨道电子学提供了新途径，特别是通过极化控制实现轨道输运的可逆切换。

title: Evaluating dispersion models for ab initio simulation of G-I and G-II molten fluoride salts
summary: Ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) based on density functional theory (DFT) is a powerful approach for modeling molten salts. However, standard exchange-correlation functionals often neglect dispersion interactions, introducing potential errors in property predictions. Dispersion corrections are commonly applied ad hoc to match experimental salt densities, but their systematic impact on predicting structure, thermophysical, and transport properties of salt remains unexamined. This study evaluates the impact of Grimme's DFT-D and nonlocal van der Waals (vdW-DF) corrections on molten fluorides of Group-I (LiF, NaF, KF) and Group-II (BeF$_2$, MgF$_2$, CaF$_2$), which are relevant to reactor applications. Results indicate that dispersion corrections have a minor effect on binding energies but significantly influence density predictions. Systematic benchmarking across compositions and temperatures reveals that semi-empirical dispersion models often produce more accurate densities compared to vdW-DF. Diffusion coefficients remain largely invariant to dispersion corrections at fixed densities, while coordination number distributions exhibit notable differences based on chosen dispersion. BeF$_2$, in particular, deviates from other fluorides, showing pronounced structural and dynamical differences in the absence of dispersion corrections. This highlights the necessity of dispersion effects for high-charge-density cations that promote intermediate- to long-range ordering. These findings provide a systematic framework for selecting dispersion models in molten salt simulations, improving density and structural predictions.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了DFT-D和vdW-DF色散修正对熔融氟化物性质预测的影响，发现色散修正对密度预测影响显著但对扩散系数影响较小，为熔盐模拟中的色散模型选择提供了框架。
AI.motivation: 标准DFT交换相关泛函常忽略色散相互作用，导致熔盐性质预测存在潜在误差。虽然常用色散修正来匹配实验密度，但其对熔盐结构、热物理和输运性质的系统性影响尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 使用从头算分子动力学(AIMD)结合密度泛函理论(DFT)，评估Grimme的DFT-D和非局域范德华(vdW-DF)色散修正对第I族(LiF, NaF, KF)和第II族(BeF₂, MgF₂, CaF₂)熔融氟化物的影响，进行系统基准测试。
AI.result: 色散修正对结合能影响较小，但对密度预测影响显著；半经验色散模型通常比vdW-DF产生更准确的密度；扩散系数在固定密度下基本不受色散修正影响；配位数分布因所选色散模型而异；BeF₂在无色散修正时表现出明显的结构和动力学差异。
AI.conclusion: 色散效应对于促进中长程有序的高电荷密度阳离子至关重要，该研究为熔盐模拟中选择色散模型提供了系统性框架，改进了密度和结构预测的准确性。

title: Uncertainty-aware phase fraction prediction and active-learning-guided out-of-domain discovery of refractory multi-principal element alloys
summary: Refractory multi-principal element alloys (RMPEAs) represent a novel class of alloys characterized by an extensive compositional design space and the potential for exceptional mechanical performance under extreme conditions. While accurate phase stability prediction is essential for their robust design, existing machine learning approaches rely on deterministic mappings from composition-derived features to phase labels, neglecting the uncertainty inherent in such predictions. In this study, we present a deep learning framework based on Mixture Density Networks (MDNs) to predict phase fractions in RMPEAs and quantify the associated aleatoric uncertainty across a wide temperature range. By training separate models for up to six constituent phases of RMPEAs using CALPHAD derived data, our approach achieves high predictive accuracy while capturing the probabilistic nature of phase formation. To address epistemic uncertainty arising from incomplete knowledge of the most informative features, we perform a perturbation-based feature importance analysis and identify a minimally sufficient input set that maintains both predictive performance and uncertainty calibration. Finally, we propose an uncertainty-based active learning strategy to discover novel RMPEAs with the target phase incorporating previously unseen elements, while investigating the exploration-exploitation trade-off in model-guided discovery.
