Our uncertainty-aware framework has the potential to accelerate and improve the reliability of discovering novel high-performance alloys and is broadly applicable.

AI.tldr: 开发基于混合密度网络的深度学习框架，用于预测难熔多主元合金的相分数并量化不确定性，结合主动学习策略加速新型合金发现
AI.motivation: 难熔多主元合金具有广阔的成分设计空间和优异机械性能潜力，但现有机器学习方法依赖确定性映射，忽略了预测中的不确定性，需要开发能量化不确定性的可靠预测框架
AI.method: 使用混合密度网络构建深度学习框架，训练多个模型预测不同相分数；通过扰动特征重要性分析确定最小充分输入集；提出基于不确定性的主动学习策略，平衡探索与利用
AI.result: 框架实现了高预测精度，同时捕捉了相形成的概率特性；识别了保持预测性能和不确定性校准的最小输入特征集；主动学习策略能发现含新元素的目标相合金
AI.conclusion: 该不确定性感知框架能加速并提高发现新型高性能合金的可靠性，具有广泛适用性，为合金设计提供了更稳健的预测工具

title: Direct observation of quadruple spin-texture locking in a 2D d-wave altermagnet
summary: Altermagnets combine vanishing net magnetization with nonrelativistic, momentum-dependent spin splitting, offering a new paradigm for spintronics. Spin-crystal symmetry coupling, namely spin-lattice locking, is the defining mechanism of altermagnetism, enforcing opposite spin sublattices in real space and spin-momentum-locked electronic structure in reciprocal space. Direct atomic-scale visualization of spin-lattice locking therefore constitutes a decisive benchmark of the altermagnetic state, yet such evidence has remained elusive despite extensive efforts. Here we show that the electronic states in RbV2Se2O exhibit a d-wave-like spin texture at the sublattice level, providing the first atomic-scale evidence of spin-lattice locking with a predominantly c-axis spin orientation. By employing an in-situ, field-switchable spin-polarized Cr tip, we realize spin-contrast mapping of quasiparticle interference at identical energies, overcoming a long-standing experimental barrier in altermagnets. The resulting interference patterns exhibit pronounced spin-dependent modulations, establishing spin scattering locking and spin momentum locking as the real and reciprocal space manifestations. Unexpectedly, we uncover that the spin-selective scattering response is organized by a long-period stripe modulation, giving rise to a previously unidentified form of spin-texture locking, spin-stripe locking. We attribute this behavior to the emergence of a spin-density-wave moiré pattern. Together, these results establish a unified picture of quadruple spin-texture locking phenomena in a d-wave altermagnet, and position altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring many-body interactions among intertwined degrees of freedom, including spin, lattice, momentum, moiré potential and valley.

AI.tldr: 首次在原子尺度上直接观测到d波型反铁磁体RbV2Se2O中的自旋-晶格锁定现象，揭示了自旋-条纹锁定等新型自旋纹理锁定机制
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体具有零净磁化但存在动量依赖的自旋劈裂特性，为自旋电子学提供了新范式。自旋-晶格锁定是反铁磁性的核心机制，但原子尺度的直接观测证据一直缺失
AI.method: 使用原位场可切换的自旋极化Cr尖端，在相同能量下进行准粒子干涉的自旋对比映射，克服了反铁磁体实验中的长期障碍
AI.result: 在RbV2Se2O中观测到d波型自旋纹理，首次获得原子尺度自旋-晶格锁定证据；发现自旋选择性散射响应由长周期条纹调制组织，揭示出自旋-条纹锁定新现象；建立了自旋密度波莫尔图案的解释
AI.conclusion: 在d波反铁磁体中建立了四重自旋纹理锁定现象的统一图像，将反铁磁体定位为探索自旋、晶格、动量、莫尔势和谷等多自由度相互作用的通用平台

title: Plasmonic Photocatalysis Enables Selective Oxidative Coupling of Methane with Nitrous Oxide under Ambient Conditions
summary: Methane (CH4) and nitrous oxide (N2O) are potent greenhouse gases that represent substantial chemical energy. Conversion of these abundant waste gases to high-value chemicals typically requires high temperatures up to 1000 C, producing substantial CO2 emissions and limited selectivity toward desirable multi-carbon products. Here we demonstrate a plasmonic photocatalyst that enables CH4 and N2O conversion under ambient conditions to form C2 and C3 hydrocarbons. By systematically tuning AuPd alloys on TiO2, we identify an optimal composition (AuPd0.05) where Au enhances light harvesting and Pd enables selective C-H activation and C-C coupling. Under visible-light illumination, this catalyst produces C2H4, C2H6, C3H6, and C3H8 with ~80% selectivity while suppressing CO2 formation. In-situ spectroscopy and hot-carrier calculations show that plasmon-generated carriers redistribute interfacial hydroxyl intermediates, shifting the hydrophilic center to suppress overoxidation. Ab-initio calculations further reveal the reduction in C-C coupling barriers from 2.7 eV to 0.7 eV under illumination. Our work illustrates how engineering interfacial electronic and adsorbate dynamics enables selective multicarbon formation.

AI.tldr: 利用AuPd合金/TiO2等离子体光催化剂，在常温常压下将CH4和N2O转化为C2-C3烃类，选择性达80%，抑制CO2生成
AI.motivation: CH4和N2O是强效温室气体，传统转化方法需要高温（达1000°C），产生大量CO2排放且对多碳产物选择性有限。需要开发在温和条件下高效选择性转化的新方法。
AI.method: 设计AuPd合金/TiO2等离子体光催化剂，通过系统调控合金组成（发现AuPd0.05最优），利用Au增强光捕获，Pd促进选择性C-H活化和C-C偶联。结合原位光谱和热载流子计算研究机理。
AI.result: 在可见光照射下，催化剂产生C2H4、C2H6、C3H6和C3H8，选择性约80%，同时抑制CO2形成。计算显示C-C偶联能垒从2.7eV降至0.7eV。
AI.conclusion: 通过调控界面电子和吸附物动力学，可实现选择性多碳产物形成，为温室气体在温和条件下转化为高价值化学品提供了新途径。

title: Moire Control of Alterelectric Quadrupolar Order
summary: Alterelectricity is a compensated ferroic state in which quadrupolar electronic order reshapes low-energy electronic structure without producing a net polarization. Here we show that a moiré superlattice can turn such order into a controllable phase. Within a Bloch-periodic two-orbital theory, the slowly varying interlayer registry is coarse-grained into an effective moiré field acting on a self-consistent two-component alterelectric quadrupole. The resulting phase develops above a strongly filling-dependent instability threshold and crosses over from a weakly selected regime into a robust axial-dominated ground state, while the diagonal-dominated branch remains only a weak competitor. A registry-phase sweep supplies an explicit continuous path through internal quadrupole space, demonstrating that the moiré superlattice does more than stabilize alterelectricity: it steers its internal orientation. This orientational selection is encoded directly in the redistribution of low-energy spectral weight across the moiré Brillouin zone. These results identify moiré superlattices as a generic route to controllable alterelectric order and to programmable anisotropic electronic functionality.

AI.tldr: 莫尔超晶格可将四极电子序转化为可控相，通过调节莫尔场来操控四极矩内部取向，实现可编程的各向异性电子功能。
AI.motivation: 研究莫尔超晶格如何将补偿铁电态（四极电子序）转变为可控相，探索通过莫尔场操控四极矩内部取向的可能性，以实现可编程的各向异性电子功能。
AI.method: 采用布洛赫周期双轨道理论，将缓慢变化的层间配准粗粒化为作用于自洽双分量补偿铁电四极矩的有效莫尔场，通过配准相扫描探索四极矩空间中的连续路径。
AI.result: 莫尔超晶格不仅能稳定补偿铁电序，还能操控其内部取向；相变发生在强填充依赖的不稳定阈值之上，从弱选择机制过渡到稳健的轴向主导基态；对角主导分支仅作为弱竞争者存在。
AI.conclusion: 莫尔超晶格是实现可控补偿铁电序和可编程各向异性电子功能的通用途径，其取向选择直接编码在莫尔布里渊区低能谱权重的重新分布中。
